Average power is 49.5. Type is given by `y * 15 / 63`, where `y` is similar to `x` above, except constructed from bit 0. (Bit 0 is 1 if the IV is odd.) The result is looked up in the following table. Value | Type ----: | -------- 0 | Fighting 1 | Flying 2 | Poison 3 | Ground 4 | Rock 5 | Bug 6 | Ghost 7 | Steel 8 | Fire 9 | Water 10 | Grass 11 | Electric 12 | Psychic 13 | Ice 14 | Dragon 15 | Dark This move thus cannot be Normal. Most other types have an equal 1/16 chance to be selected, given random IVs. However, due to the flooring used here, Bug, Fighting, and Grass appear 5/64 of the time, and Dark only 1/64 of the time.
hidden-power.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

cross-chop.name: Cross Chop
cross-chop.description: Inflicts regular damage. User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.
cross-chop.flavorText: The user delivers a double chop with its forearms crossed. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

twister.name: Twister
twister.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to make each target flinch. If the target is under the effect of Bounce, Fly, or Sky Drop, this move will hit with double power.
twister.flavorText: The user whips up a vicious tornado to tear at opposing Pokémon. This may also make them flinch.

rain-dance.name: Rain Dance
rain-dance.description: Changes the weather to rain for five turns, during which Water moves inflict 50% extra damage, and Fire moves inflict half damage. If the user is holding Damp Rock, this effect lasts for eight turns. Thunder has 100% accuracy. If the target has used Detect or Protect, Thunder has a (100 - accuracy)% chance to break through the protection. Solar Beam has half power. Moonlight, Morning Sun, and Synthesis heal only 1/4 of the user’s max HP. Pokémon with Swift Swim have doubled original Speed. Pokémon with Forecast become Water. Pokémon with Dry Skin heal 1/8 max HP, Pokémon with Hydration are cured of major status effects, and Pokémon with Rain Dish heal 1/16 max HP at the end of each turn.
rain-dance.flavorText: The user summons a heavy rain that falls for five turns, powering up Water-type attacks. The rain also lowers the power of Fire-type attacks.

sunny-day.name: Sunny Day
sunny-day.description: Changes the weather to sunshine for five turns, during which Fire moves inflict 50% extra damage, and Water moves inflict half damage. If the user is holding Heat Rock, this effect lasts for eight turns. Pokémon cannot become frozen. Thunder has 50% accuracy. Solar Beam skips its charge turn. Moonlight, Morning Sun, and Synthesis heal 2/3 of the user’s max HP. Pokémon with Chlorophyll have doubled original Speed. Pokémon with Forecast become Fire. Pokémon with Leaf Guard are not affected by major status effects. Pokémon with Flower Gift change form; every Pokémon on their side of the field have their original Attack and Special Attack increased by 50%. Pokémon with Dry Skin lose 1/8 max HP at the end of each turn. Pokémon with Solar Power have their original Special Attack raised by 50% but lose 1/8 their max HP at the end of each turn.
sunny-day.flavorText: The user intensifies the sun for five turns, powering up Fire-type attacks. The sunlight also lowers the power of Water-type attacks.

crunch.name: Crunch
crunch.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
crunch.flavorText: The user crunches up the target with sharp fangs. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

mirror-coat.name: Mirror Coat
mirror-coat.description: Targets the last opposing Pokémon to hit the user with a special move this turn. Inflicts twice the damage that move did to the user. If there is no eligible target, this move will fail. Type immunity applies, but other type effects are ignored. This move cannot be copied by Mirror Move, nor selected by Assist or Metronome.
mirror-coat.flavorText: A retaliatory attack that counters any special move, inflicting double the damage taken.

psych-up.name: Psych Up
psych-up.description: Discards the user’s stat changes and copies the target’s. This move cannot be copied by Mirror Move.
psych-up.flavorText: The user hypnotizes itself into copying any stat change made by the target.

extreme-speed.name: Extreme Speed
extreme-speed.flavorText: The user charges the target at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

ancient-power.name: Ancient Power
ancient-power.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to raise all of the user’s stats one stage.
ancient-power.flavorText: The user attacks with a prehistoric power. This may also boost all the user's stats at once.

shadow-ball.name: Shadow Ball
shadow-ball.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
shadow-ball.flavorText: The user attacks by hurling a shadowy blob at the target. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.

future-sight.name: Future Sight
future-sight.description: Inflicts typeless regular damage at the end of the third turn, starting with this one. This move cannot score a critical hit. If the target switches out, its replacement will be hit instead. Damage is calculated at the time this move is used; stat changes and switching out during the delay won’t change the damage inflicted. No move with this effect can be used against the same target again until after the end of the third turn. This effect breaks through Wonder Guard. If the target is protected by Protect or Detect on the turn this move is used, this move will fail. However, the damage on the third turn will break through protection. The damage is applied at the end of the turn, so it ignores Endure and Focus Sash. This move cannot be copied by Mirror Move.
future-sight.flavorText: Two turns after this move is used, a hunk of psychic energy attacks the target.

rock-smash.name: Rock Smash
rock-smash.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
rock-smash.flavorText: The user attacks with a punch. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

whirlpool.name: Whirlpool
whirlpool.description: Inflicts regular damage. For the next 2–5 turns, the target cannot leave the field and is damaged for 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn. The user continues to use other moves during this time. If the user leaves the field, this effect ends. Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times. Averages to 3 hits per use. If the target is in the first turn of Dive, this move will hit with double power.
whirlpool.flavorText: The user traps the target inside a violent, swirling whirlpool that inflicts damage for four to five turns.

beat-up.name: Beat Up
beat-up.description: Inflicts typeless regular damage. Every Pokémon in the user’s party, excepting those that have fainted or have a major status effect, attacks the target. Calculated stats are ignored; the base stats for the target and assorted attackers are used instead. The random factor in the damage formula is not used. Dark Pokémon still get STAB. This effect breaks through Wonder Guard.
beat-up.flavorText: The user gets all party Pokémon to attack the target. The more party Pokémon, the greater the number of attacks.

fake-out.name: Fake Out
fake-out.description: Inflicts regular damage. Causes the target to flinch. Can only be used on the user’s first turn after entering the field.
fake-out.flavorText: This attack hits first and makes the target flinch. It works only on the first turn each time the user enters battle.

uproar.name: Uproar
uproar.description: Inflicts regular damage. User is forced to use this move for 2–5 turns, selected at random. All Pokémon on the field wake up, and none can fall to sleep until the lock-in ends. Pokémon cannot use Rest during this effect. This move cannot be selected by Sleep Talk.
uproar.flavorText: The user attacks in an uproar for three turns. During that time, no Pokémon can fall asleep.

stockpile.name: Stockpile
stockpile.description: Raises the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage each. Stores energy for use with Spit Up and Swallow. Up to three levels of energy can be stored, and all are lost if the user leaves the field. Energy is still stored even if the stat boosts cannot be applied. If the user uses Baton Pass, the stat boosts are passed as normal, but the stored energy is not.
stockpile.flavorText: The user stores power and boosts its Defense and Sp. Def stats. This move can be used up to three times.

spit-up.name: Spit Up
spit-up.description: Inflicts regular damage. Power is equal to 100 times the amount of energy stored by Stockpile. Ignores the random factor in the damage formula. Stored energy is consumed, and the user’s Defense and Special Defense are reset to what they would be if Stockpile had not been used. If the user has no energy stored, this move will fail. This move cannot be copied by Mirror Move.
spit-up.flavorText: The power stored using the move Stockpile is released at once in an attack. The more power is stored, the greater the move's power.

swallow.name: Swallow
swallow.description: Heals the user depending on the amount of energy stored by Stockpile: 1/4 its max HP after one use, 1/2 its max HP after two uses, or fully after three uses. Stored energy is consumed, and the user’s Defense and Special Defense are reset to what they would be if Stockpile had not been used. If the user has no energy stored, this move will fail.
swallow.flavorText: The power stored using the move Stockpile is absorbed by the user to restore its own HP. The more power is stored, the more HP is restored.

heat-wave.name: Heat Wave
heat-wave.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to burn the target.
heat-wave.flavorText: The user attacks by exhaling hot breath on opposing Pokémon. This may also leave them with a burn.

hail.name: Hail
hail.description: Changes the weather to hail for five turns, during which non-Ice Pokémon are damaged for 1/16 their max HP at the end of every turn. If the user is holding Icy Rock, this effect lasts for eight turns. Blizzard has 100% accuracy. If the target has used Detect or Protect, Blizzard has a (100 - accuracy)% chance to break through the protection. Moonlight, Morning Sun, and Synthesis heal only 1/4 of the user’s max HP. Pokémon with Snow Cloak are exempt from this effect’s damage.
hail.flavorText: The user summons a hailstorm lasting five turns. It damages all Pokémon except Ice types.

torment.name: Torment
torment.description: Prevents the target from attempting to use the same move twice in a row. When the target leaves the field, this effect ends. If the target is forced to attempt a repeated move due to Choice Band, Choice Scarf, Choice Specs, Disable, Encore, Taunt, only having PP remaining for one move, or any other effect, the target will use Struggle instead. The target is then free to use the forced move next turn, as it didn’t use that move this turn.
torment.flavorText: The user torments and enrages the target, making it incapable of using the same move twice in a row.

flatter.name: Flatter
flatter.description: Raises the target’s Special Attack by one stage, then confuses it.
flatter.flavorText: Flattery is used to confuse the target. However, this also boosts the target's Sp. Atk stat.

will-o-wisp.name: Will O Wisp
will-o-wisp.flavorText: The user shoots a sinister flame at the target to inflict a burn.

memento.name: Memento
memento.description: Lowers the target’s Attack and Special Attack by two stages. User faints.
memento.flavorText: The user faints. In return, the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats are harshly lowered.

facade.name: Facade
facade.description: Inflicts regular damage. If the user is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned, this move has double power.
facade.flavorText: This move's power is doubled if the user is poisoned, burned, or paralyzed.

focus-punch.name: Focus Punch
focus-punch.description: Inflicts regular damage. If the user takes damage this turn before hitting, this move will fail. This move cannot be copied by Mirror Move, nor selected by Assist, Metronome, or Sleep Talk.
focus-punch.flavorText: The user focuses its mind before launching a punch. This move fails if the user is hit before using the move.

smelling-salts.name: Smelling Salts
smelling-salts.description: Inflicts regular damage. If the target is paralyzed, this move has double power, and the target is cured of its paralysis.
smelling-salts.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

follow-me.name: Follow Me
follow-me.description: Until the end of this turn, any moves that opposing Pokémon target solely at the user’s ally will instead target the user. If both Pokémon on the same side of the field use this move on the same turn, the Pokémon that uses it last will become the target. This effect takes priority over Lightning Rod and Storm Drain. If the user’s ally switches out, opposing Pokémon may still hit it with Pursuit. This move cannot be selected by Assist or Metronome.
follow-me.flavorText: The user draws attention to itself, making all opposing Pokémon take aim only at the user.

nature-power.name: Nature Power
nature-power.description: Uses another move chosen according to the terrain. Terrain | Selected move ------------------------- | ------------------ Building | Tri Attack Cave | Rock Slide Deep water | Hydro Pump Desert | Earthquake Grass | Seed Bomb Mountain | Rock Slide Road | Earthquake Shallow water | Hydro Pump Snow | Blizzard Tall grass | Seed Bomb Electric Terrain | Thunderbolt Grassy Terrain | Energy Ball Misty Terrain | Moonblast In Pokémon Battle Revolution: Terrain | Selected move -------------- | ------------------ Courtyard | Tri Attack Crystal | Rock Slide Gateway | Hydro Pump Magma | Rock Slide Main Street | Tri Attack Neon | Tri Attack Stargazer | Rock Slide Sunny Park | Seed Bomb Sunset | Earthquake Waterfall | Seed Bomb This move cannot be copied by Mirror Move.
nature-power.flavorText: This attack makes use of nature’s power. Its effects vary depending on the user’s environment.

charge.name: Charge
charge.description: Raises the user’s Special Defense by one stage. If the user uses an Electric move next turn, its power will be doubled.
charge.flavorText: The user becomes charged, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move it uses. This also boosts the user's Sp. Def stat.

taunt.name: Taunt
taunt.description: Target is forced to only use damaging moves for the next 3–5 turns, selected at random. Moves that select other moves not known in advance do not count as damaging. Assist, Copycat, Me First, Metronome, Mirror Move, and Sleep Talk do not directly inflict damage and thus may not be used. Bide, Counter, Endeavor, Metal Burst, and Mirror Coat are allowed.
taunt.flavorText: The target is taunted into a rage that allows it to use only attack moves for three turns.

helping-hand.name: Helping Hand
helping-hand.description: Boosts the power of the target’s moves by 50% until the end of this turn. This move cannot be copied by Mirror Move, nor selected by Assist or Metronome.
helping-hand.flavorText: The user assists an ally by boosting the power of that ally's attack.

trick.name: Trick
trick.description: User and target permanently swap held items. Works even if one of the Pokémon isn’t holding anything. If either Pokémon is holding mail, this move will fail. If either Pokémon has Multitype or Sticky Hold, this move will fail. If this move results in a Pokémon obtaining Choice Band, Choice Scarf, or Choice Specs, and that Pokémon was the latter of the pair to move this turn, then the move it used this turn becomes its chosen forced move. This applies even if both Pokémon had a choice item before this move was used. If the first of the two Pokémon gains a choice item, it may select whatever choice move it wishes next turn. Neither the user nor the target can recover its item with Recycle. This move cannot be selected by Assist or Metronome.
trick.flavorText: The user catches the target off guard and swaps the target's held item with its own.

role-play.name: Role Play
role-play.description: User’s ability is replaced with the target’s until the user leaves the field. Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers. If the target has Flower Gift, Forecast, Illusion, Imposter, Multitype, Stance Change, Trace, Wonder Guard, or Zen Mode, this move will fail. This move cannot be copied by Mirror Move.
role-play.flavorText: The user mimics the target completely, copying the target's Ability.

wish.name: Wish
wish.description: At the end of the next turn, user will be healed for half its max HP. If the user is switched out, its replacement will be healed instead for half of the user’s max HP. If the user faints or is forcefully switched by Roar or Whirlwind, this effect will not activate.
wish.flavorText: One turn after this move is used, the user's or its replacement's HP is restored by up to half the user's max HP.

assist.name: Assist
assist.description: Uses a move from another Pokémon in the user’s party, both selected at random. Moves from fainted Pokémon can be used. If there are no eligible Pokémon or moves, this move will fail. This move will not select Assist, Chatter, Circle Throw, Copycat, Counter, Covet, Destiny Bond, Detect, Dig, Dive, Dragon Tail, Endure, Feint, Fly Focus Punch, Follow Me, Helping Hand, Me First, Metronome, Mimic, Mirror Coat, Mirror Move, Phantom Force Protect, Quick Guard, Roar Shadow Force, Sketch, Sleep Talk, Snatch, Struggle, Switcheroo, Thief, Trick, Whirlwind, or Wide Guard. This move cannot be copied by Mirror Move, nor selected by Metronome or Sleep Talk.
assist.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

ingrain.name: Ingrain
ingrain.description: Prevents the user from switching out. User regains 1/16 of its max HP at the end of every turn. If the user was immune to Ground attacks, it will now take normal damage from them. Roar and Whirlwind will not affect the user. The user cannot use Magnet Rise. The user may still use U-turn to leave the field. This effect can be passed with Baton Pass.
ingrain.flavorText: The user lays roots that restore its own HP every turn. Because the user is now rooted, it can't switch out.

superpower.name: Superpower
superpower.description: Inflicts regular damage, then lowers the user’s Attack and Defense by one stage each.
superpower.flavorText: The user attacks the target with great power. This also lowers the user's Attack and Defense stats.

magic-coat.name: Magic Coat
magic-coat.description: The first non-damaging move targeting the user this turn that inflicts major status effects, stat changes, or trapping effects will be reflected at its user. Defog, Memento, and Teeter Dance are not reflected. Attract, Flatter, Gastro Acid, Leech Seed, Swagger, Worry Seed, and Yawn are reflected. This move cannot be copied by Mirror Move.
magic-coat.flavorText: Moves like Leech Seed and moves that inflict status conditions are blocked by a barrier and reflected back to the user of those moves.

recycle.name: Recycle
recycle.description: User recovers the last item consumed by the user or a Pokémon in its position on the field. The item must be used again before it can be recovered by this move again. If the user is holding an item, this move fails. Items taken or given away by Covet, Knock Off, Switcheroo, Thief, or Trick may not be recovered.
recycle.flavorText: The user recycles a held item that has been used in battle so it can be used again.

revenge.name: Revenge
revenge.description: Inflicts regular damage. If the target damaged the user this turn and was the last to do so, this move has double power. Pain Split does not count as damaging the user.
revenge.flavorText: This attack move’s power is doubled if the user has been hurt by the opponent in the same turn.

brick-break.name: Brick Break
brick-break.description: Destroys any Light Screen or Reflect on the target’s side of the field, then inflicts regular damage.
brick-break.flavorText: The user attacks with a swift chop. This move can also break barriers, such as Light Screen and Reflect.

yawn.name: Yawn
yawn.description: Puts the target to sleep at the end of the next turn. Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers. If the target leaves the field, this effect is canceled. If the target has a status effect when this move is used, this move will fail. If the target is protected by Safeguard when this move is used, this move will fail. Insomnia and Vital Spirit prevent the sleep if the target has either at the end of the next turn, but will not cause this move to fail on use.
yawn.flavorText: The user lets loose a huge yawn that lulls the target into falling asleep on the next turn.

knock-off.name: Knock Off
knock-off.description: Inflicts regular damage. Target loses its held item. Neither the user nor the target can recover its item with Recycle. If the target has Multitype or Sticky Hold, it will take damage but not lose its item.
knock-off.flavorText: The user slaps down the target's held item, making it unusable for that battle. This move does more damage if the target has a held item.

endeavor.name: Endeavor
endeavor.description: Inflicts exactly enough damage to lower the target’s HP to equal the user’s. If the target’s HP is not higher than the user’s, this move has no effect. Type immunity applies, but other type effects are ignored. This effect counts as damage for moves that respond to damage.
endeavor.flavorText: The user inflicts damage by cutting down the target's HP to roughly equal the user's HP.

eruption.name: Eruption
eruption.description: Inflicts regular damage. Power increases with the user’s remaining HP and is given by `150 * HP / max HP`, to a maximum of 150 when the user has full HP.
eruption.flavorText: The user attacks opposing Pokémon with explosive fury. The lower the user's HP, the lower the move's power.

skill-swap.name: Skill Swap
skill-swap.description: User and target switch abilities. Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers. If either Pokémon has Multitype or Wonder Guard, this move will fail.
skill-swap.flavorText: The user employs its psychic power to exchange Abilities with the target.

imprison.name: Imprison
imprison.description: Prevents any Pokémon on the opposing side of the field from using any move the user knows until the user leaves the field. This effect is live; if the user obtains new moves while on the field, these moves become restricted. If no opposing Pokémon knows any of the user’s moves when this move is used, this move will fail.
imprison.flavorText: If opposing Pokémon know any move also known by the user, they are prevented from using it.

refresh.name: Refresh
refresh.description: Removes a burn, paralysis, or poison from the user.
refresh.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

grudge.name: Grudge
grudge.description: If the user faints before it next acts, the move that fainted it will have its PP dropped to 0. End-of-turn damage does not trigger this effect.
grudge.flavorText: If the user faints, the user’s grudge fully depletes the PP of the opponent’s move that knocked it out.

snatch.name: Snatch
snatch.description: The next time a Pokémon uses a beneficial move on itself or itself and its ally this turn, the user of this move will steal the move and use it itself. Moves which may be stolen by this move are identified by the "snatchable" flag. If two Pokémon use this move on the same turn, the faster Pokémon will steal the first beneficial move, and the slower Pokémon will then steal it again—thus, only the slowest Pokémon using this move ultimately gains a stolen move’s effect. If the user steals Psych Up, it will target the Pokémon that used Psych Up. If the user was the original target of Psych Up, and the Pokémon that originally used it’s affected by Pressure, it will only lose 1 PP. This move cannot be copied by Mirror Move, nor selected by Assist or Metronome.
snatch.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

secret-power.name: Secret Power
secret-power.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to inflict an effect chosen according to the terrain. Terrain | Effect -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- Building | Paralyzes target Cave | Makes target flinch Deep water | Lowers target’s Attack by one stage Desert | Lowers target’s accuracy by one stage Grass | Puts target to sleep Mountain | Makes target flinch Road | Lowers target’s accuracy by one stage Shallow water | Lowers target’s Attack by one stage Snow | Freezes target Tall grass | Puts target to sleep In Pokémon Battle Revolution: Terrain | Effect -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- Courtyard | Paralyzes target Crystal | Makes target flinch Gateway | Lowers target’s Attack by one stage Magma | Makes target flinch Main Street | Paralyzes target Neon | Paralyzes target Stargazer | Makes target flinch Sunny Park | Puts target to sleep Sunset | Lowers target’s accuracy by one stage Waterfall | Puts target to sleep
secret-power.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

dive.name: Dive
dive.description: Inflicts regular damage. User dives underwater for one turn, becoming immune to attack, and hits on the second turn. During the immune turn, Surf, and Whirlpool still hit the user normally, and their power is doubled if appropriate. The user may be hit during its immune turn if under the effect of Lock-On, Mind Reader, or No Guard. This move cannot be selected by Sleep Talk.
dive.flavorText: The user dives on the first turn, then floats up and attacks on the next turn.

arm-thrust.name: Arm Thrust
arm-thrust.description: Inflicts regular damage. Hits 2–5 times in one turn. Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times. Averages to 3 hits per use.
arm-thrust.flavorText: The user attacks the target with open-palmed arm thrusts. This move hits two to five times in a row.

camouflage.name: Camouflage
camouflage.description: User’s type changes according to the terrain. Terrain | New type -------------- | -------------- Building | Normal Cave | Rock Desert | Ground Grass | Grass Mountain | Rock Ocean | Water Pond | Water Road | Ground Snow | Ice Tall grass | Grass In Pokémon Battle Revolution: Terrain | New type -------------- | -------------- Courtyard | Normal Crystal | Rock Gateway | Water Magma | Rock Main Street | Normal Neon | Normal Stargazer | Rock Sunny Park | Grass Sunset | Ground Waterfall | Grass
camouflage.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

tail-glow.name: Tail Glow
tail-glow.description: Raises the user’s Special Attack by three stages.
tail-glow.flavorText: The user stares at flashing lights to focus its mind, drastically boosting its Sp. Atk stat.

luster-purge.name: Luster Purge
luster-purge.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
luster-purge.flavorText: The user lets loose a damaging burst of light. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

mist-ball.name: Mist Ball
mist-ball.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.
mist-ball.flavorText: A mist-like flurry of down envelops and damages the target. This may also lower the target's Sp. Atk stat.

feather-dance.name: Feather Dance
feather-dance.description: Lowers the target’s Attack by two stages.
feather-dance.flavorText: The user covers the target's body with a mass of down that harshly lowers its Attack stat.

teeter-dance.name: Teeter Dance
teeter-dance.flavorText: The user performs a wobbly dance that confuses every Pokémon around it.

blaze-kick.name: Blaze Kick
blaze-kick.description: Inflicts regular damage. User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move. Has a chance to burn the target.
blaze-kick.flavorText: The user launches a kick that has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit. This may also leave the target with a burn.

mud-sport.name: Mud Sport
mud-sport.description: Electric moves inflict half damage, regardless of target. If the user leaves the field, this effect ends.
mud-sport.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

ice-ball.name: Ice Ball
ice-ball.description: Inflicts regular damage. User is forced to use this move for five turns. Power doubles every time this move is used in succession to a maximum of 16x, and resets to normal after the lock-in ends. If this move misses or becomes unusable, the lock-in ends. If the user has used Defense Curl since entering the field, this move has double power.
ice-ball.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

needle-arm.name: Needle Arm
needle-arm.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to make the target flinch.
needle-arm.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

slack-off.name: Slack Off
slack-off.description: Heals the user for half its max HP.
slack-off.flavorText: The user slacks off, restoring its own HP by up to half its max HP.

hyper-voice.name: Hyper Voice
hyper-voice.flavorText: The user attacks by letting loose a horribly loud, resounding cry.

poison-fang.name: Poison Fang
poison-fang.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to badly poison the target.
poison-fang.flavorText: The user bites the target with toxic fangs. This may also leave the target badly poisoned.

crush-claw.name: Crush Claw
crush-claw.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
crush-claw.flavorText: The user slashes the target with hard and sharp claws. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

blast-burn.name: Blast Burn
blast-burn.description: Inflicts regular damage. User loses its next turn to "recharge", and cannot attack or switch out during that turn.
blast-burn.flavorText: The target is razed by a fiery explosion. The user can't move on the next turn.

hydro-cannon.name: Hydro Cannon
hydro-cannon.description: Inflicts regular damage. User loses its next turn to "recharge", and cannot attack or switch out during that turn.
hydro-cannon.flavorText: The target is hit with a watery blast. The user can't move on the next turn.

meteor-mash.name: Meteor Mash
meteor-mash.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to raise the user’s Attack one stage.
meteor-mash.flavorText: The target is hit with a hard punch fired like a meteor. This may also boost the user’s Attack stat.

astonish.name: Astonish
astonish.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to make the target flinch.
astonish.flavorText: The user attacks the target by crying out in a startling fashion. This may also make the target flinch.

weather-ball.name: Weather Ball
weather-ball.description: Inflicts regular damage. If a weather move is active, this move has double power, and its type becomes the type of the weather move. Shadow Sky is typeless for the purposes of this move.
weather-ball.flavorText: This move's type and power change depending on the weather at the time the move is used.

aromatherapy.name: Aromatherapy
aromatherapy.description: Removes major status effects and confusion from every Pokémon in the user’s party.
aromatherapy.flavorText: This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered.

fake-tears.name: Fake Tears
fake-tears.description: Lowers the target’s Special Defense by two stages.
fake-tears.flavorText: The user feigns crying to fluster the target. This harshly lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.

air-cutter.name: Air Cutter
air-cutter.description: Inflicts regular damage. User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.
air-cutter.flavorText: The user launches razor-like wind to slash opposing Pokémon. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

overheat.name: Overheat
overheat.description: Inflicts regular damage, then lowers the user’s Special Attack by two stages.
overheat.flavorText: The user attacks the target with all its might. The recoil from this move harshly lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat.

odor-sleuth.name: Odor Sleuth
odor-sleuth.description: Resets the target’s evasion to normal and prevents any further boosting until the target leaves the field. A Ghost under this effect takes normal damage from Normal and Fighting moves. This move itself ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.
odor-sleuth.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

rock-tomb.name: Rock Tomb
rock-tomb.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
rock-tomb.flavorText: The user hurls boulders at the target to inflict damage. This also lowers the target's Speed stat by cutting off its movement.

silver-wind.name: Silver Wind
silver-wind.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to raise all of the user’s stats one stage.
silver-wind.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

metal-sound.name: Metal Sound
metal-sound.description: Lowers the target’s Special Defense by two stages.
metal-sound.flavorText: A horrible sound like scraping metal harshly lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.

grass-whistle.name: Grass Whistle
grass-whistle.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

tickle.name: Tickle
tickle.description: Lowers the target’s Attack and Defense by one stage.
tickle.flavorText: The user tickles the target into laughing, lowering its Attack and Defense stats.

cosmic-power.name: Cosmic Power
cosmic-power.description: Raises the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage.
cosmic-power.flavorText: The user absorbs a mystical power from space to boost its Defense and Sp. Def stats.

water-spout.name: Water Spout
water-spout.description: Inflicts regular damage. Power increases with the user’s remaining HP and is given by `150 * HP / max HP`, to a maximum of 150 when the user has full HP.
water-spout.flavorText: The user spouts water to damage opposing Pokémon. The lower the user's HP, the lower the move's power.

signal-beam.name: Signal Beam
signal-beam.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to confuse the target.
signal-beam.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

shadow-punch.name: Shadow Punch
shadow-punch.description: Inflicts regular damage. Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.
shadow-punch.flavorText: The user throws a punch from the shadows. This attack never misses.

extrasensory.name: Extrasensory
extrasensory.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to make the target flinch.
extrasensory.flavorText: The user attacks with an odd, unseeable power. This may also make the target flinch.

sky-uppercut.name: Sky Uppercut
sky-uppercut.description: Inflicts regular damage. This move can hit Pokémon under the effect of Bounce, Fly, or Sky Drop.
sky-uppercut.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

sand-tomb.name: Sand Tomb
sand-tomb.description: Inflicts regular damage. For the next 2–5 turns, the target cannot leave the field and is damaged for 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn. The user continues to use other moves during this time. If the user leaves the field, this effect ends. Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times. Averages to 3 hits per use. Rapid Spin cancels this effect.
sand-tomb.flavorText: The user traps the target inside a harshly raging sandstorm that inflicts damage for four to five turns.

sheer-cold.name: Sheer Cold
sheer-cold.description: Inflicts damage equal to the target’s max HP. Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers. This move’s accuracy is 30% plus 1% for each level the user is higher than the target. If the user is a lower level than the target, this move will fail. Because this move inflicts a specific and finite amount of damage, Endure still prevents the target from fainting. The effects of Lock-On, Mind Reader, and No Guard still apply, as long as the user is equal or higher level than the target. However, they will not give this move a chance to break through Detect or Protect.
sheer-cold.flavorText: The target faints instantly. This move is less likely to hit the target if used by Pokémon other than Ice types.

muddy-water.name: Muddy Water
muddy-water.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.
muddy-water.flavorText: The user attacks by shooting muddy water at opposing Pokémon. This may also lower their accuracy.

bullet-seed.name: Bullet Seed
bullet-seed.description: Inflicts regular damage. Hits 2–5 times in one turn. Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times. Averages to 3 hits per use.
bullet-seed.flavorText: The user attacks by forcefully shooting seeds at the target. This move hits two to five times in a row.

aerial-ace.name: Aerial Ace
aerial-ace.description: Inflicts regular damage. Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.
aerial-ace.flavorText: The user confounds the target with speed, then slashes. This attack never misses.

icicle-spear.name: Icicle Spear
icicle-spear.description: Inflicts regular damage. Hits 2–5 times in one turn. Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times. Averages to 3 hits per use.
icicle-spear.flavorText: The user attacks by launching sharp icicles at the target. This move hits two to five times in a row.

iron-defense.name: Iron Defense
iron-defense.description: Raises the user’s Defense by two stages.
iron-defense.flavorText: The user hardens its body's surface like iron, sharply boosting its Defense stat.

block.name: Block
block.description: The target cannot switch out normally. Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers. This effect ends when the user leaves the field. The target may still escape by using Baton Pass, U-turn, or a Shed Shell. Both the user and the target pass on this effect with Baton Pass.
block.flavorText: The user blocks the target's way with arms spread wide to prevent the target from fleeing.

howl.name: Howl
howl.description: Raises the user’s Attack by one stage.
howl.flavorText: The user howls loudly to rouse itself and its allies. This boosts their Attack stats.

dragon-claw.name: Dragon Claw
dragon-claw.flavorText: The user slashes the target with huge, sharp claws to inflict damage.

frenzy-plant.name: Frenzy Plant
frenzy-plant.description: Inflicts regular damage. User loses its next turn to "recharge", and cannot attack or switch out during that turn.
frenzy-plant.flavorText: The user slams the target with the roots of an enormous tree. The user can't move on the next turn.

bulk-up.name: Bulk Up
bulk-up.description: Raises the user’s Attack and Defense by one stage each.
bulk-up.flavorText: The user tenses its muscles to bulk up its body, boosting its Attack and Defense stats.

bounce.name: Bounce
bounce.description: Inflicts regular damage. User bounces high into the air for one turn, becoming immune to attack, and hits on the second turn. Has a chance to paralyze the target. During the immune turn, Gust, Hurricane, Sky Uppercut, Smack Down, Thunder, and Twister still hit the user normally. Gust and Twister also have double power against the user. The damage from Hail and Sandstorm still applies during the immune turn. The user may be hit during its immune turn if under the effect of Lock-On, Mind Reader, or No Guard. This move cannot be used while Gravity is in effect. This move cannot be selected by Sleep Talk.
bounce.flavorText: The user bounces up high on the first turn, then drops onto the target on the next turn. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

mud-shot.name: Mud Shot
mud-shot.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
mud-shot.flavorText: The user attacks by hurling a blob of mud at the target. This also lowers the target's Speed stat.

poison-tail.name: Poison Tail
poison-tail.description: Inflicts regular damage. User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move. Has a chance to poison the target.
poison-tail.flavorText: The user hits the target with its tail. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit and may also poison the target.

covet.name: Covet
covet.description: Inflicts regular damage. If the target is holding an item and the user is not, the user will permanently take the item. Damage is still inflicted if an item cannot be taken. Pokémon with Sticky Hold or Multitype are immune to the item theft effect. The target cannot recover its item with Recycle. This move cannot be selected by Assist or Metronome.
covet.flavorText: The user endearingly approaches the target, then steals the target's held item.

volt-tackle.name: Volt Tackle
volt-tackle.description: Inflicts regular damage. User takes 1/3 the damage it inflicts in recoil. Has a chance to paralyze the target.
volt-tackle.flavorText: The user electrifies itself and charges the target. This also damages the user quite a lot. This attack may leave the target with paralysis.

magical-leaf.name: Magical Leaf
magical-leaf.description: Inflicts regular damage. Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.
magical-leaf.flavorText: The user scatters curious leaves that chase the target. This attack never misses.

water-sport.name: Water Sport
water-sport.description: Fire moves inflict half damage, regardless of target. If the user leaves the field, this effect ends.
water-sport.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

calm-mind.name: Calm Mind
calm-mind.description: Raises the user’s Special Attack and Special Defense by one stage each.
calm-mind.flavorText: The user quietly focuses its mind and calms its spirit to boost its Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats.

leaf-blade.name: Leaf Blade
leaf-blade.description: Inflicts regular damage. User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.
leaf-blade.flavorText: The user handles a sharp leaf like a sword and cuts the target to inflict damage. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

dragon-dance.name: Dragon Dance
dragon-dance.description: Raises the user’s Attack and Speed by one stage each.
dragon-dance.flavorText: The user vigorously performs a mystic, powerful dance that boosts its Attack and Speed stats.

rock-blast.name: Rock Blast
rock-blast.description: Inflicts regular damage. Hits 2–5 times in one turn. Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times. Averages to 3 hits per use.
rock-blast.flavorText: The user attacks by hurling hard rocks at the target. This move hits two to five times in a row.

shock-wave.name: Shock Wave
shock-wave.description: Inflicts regular damage. Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.
shock-wave.flavorText: The user strikes the target with a quick jolt of electricity. This attack never misses.

water-pulse.name: Water Pulse
water-pulse.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to confuse the target.
water-pulse.flavorText: The user attacks the target with a pulsing blast of water. This may also confuse the target.

doom-desire.name: Doom Desire
doom-desire.description: Inflicts typeless regular damage at the end of the third turn, starting with this one. This move cannot score a critical hit. If the target switches out, its replacement will be hit instead. Damage is calculated at the time this move is used; stat changes and switching out during the delay won’t change the damage inflicted. No move with this effect can be used against the same target again until after the end of the third turn. This effect breaks through Wonder Guard. If the target is protected by Protect or Detect on the turn this move is used, this move will fail. However, the damage on the third turn will break through protection. The damage is applied at the end of the turn, so it ignores Endure and Focus Sash. This move cannot be copied by Mirror Move.
doom-desire.flavorText: Two turns after this move is used, a concentrated bundle of light blasts the target.

psycho-boost.name: Psycho Boost
psycho-boost.description: Inflicts regular damage, then lowers the user’s Special Attack by two stages.
psycho-boost.flavorText: The user attacks the target with all its might. The recoil from this move harshly lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat.

roost.name: Roost
roost.description: Heals the user for half its max HP. If the user is Flying, its Flying type is ignored until the end of this turn.
roost.flavorText: The user lands and rests its body. This move restores the user's HP by up to half its max HP.

gravity.name: Gravity
gravity.description: For five turns (including this one), all immunities to Ground moves are disabled. For the duration of this effect, the evasion of every Pokémon on the field is lowered by two stages. Cancels the effects of Bounce, Fly, and Sky Drop. Specifically, Flying Pokémon and those with Levitate or that have used Magnet Rise are no longer immune to Ground attacks, Arena Trap, Spikes, or Toxic Spikes. Bounce, Fly, Sky Drop, High Jump Kick, Jump Kick, and Splash cannot be used while this move is in effect. *Bug*: If this move is used during a double or triple battle while Pokémon are under the effect of Sky Drop, Sky Drop’s effect is not correctly canceled on its target, and it remains high in the air indefinitely. As Sky Drop prevents the target from acting, the only way to subsequently remove it from the field is to faint it.
gravity.flavorText: Enables Flying types or Pokémon with the Levitate Ability to be hit by Ground-type moves for five turns. Moves that involve flying can't be used.

miracle-eye.name: Miracle Eye
miracle-eye.description: Resets the target’s evasion to normal and prevents any further boosting until the target leaves the field. A Dark Pokémon under this effect takes normal damage from Psychic moves. This move itself ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.
miracle-eye.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

wake-up-slap.name: Wake Up Slap
wake-up-slap.description: Inflicts regular damage. If the target is sleeping, this move has double power, and the target wakes up.
wake-up-slap.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

hammer-arm.name: Hammer Arm
hammer-arm.description: Inflicts regular damage, then lowers the user’s Speed by one stage.
hammer-arm.flavorText: The user swings its strong, heavy fist at the target to inflict damage. This also lowers the user's Speed stat.

gyro-ball.name: Gyro Ball
gyro-ball.description: Inflicts regular damage. Power increases with the target’s current Speed compared to the user, given by `1 + 25 * target Speed / user Speed`, capped at 150.
gyro-ball.flavorText: The user tackles the target with a high-speed spin. The slower the user is than the target, the greater the move's power.

healing-wish.name: Healing Wish
healing-wish.description: User faints. Its replacement’s HP is fully restored, and any major status effect is removed. If the replacement Pokémon is immediately fainted by a switch-in effect, the next replacement is healed by this move instead.
healing-wish.flavorText: The user faints. In return, the Pokémon taking its place will have its HP restored and status conditions cured.

brine.name: Brine
brine.description: Inflicts regular damage. If the target has less than half its max HP remaining, this move has double power.
brine.flavorText: This move's power is doubled if the target's HP is at half or less.

natural-gift.name: Natural Gift
natural-gift.description: Inflicts regular damage. Power and type are determined by the user’s held berry. The berry is consumed. If the user is not holding a berry, this move will fail.
natural-gift.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

feint.name: Feint
feint.description: Inflicts regular damage. Removes the effects of Detect or Protect from the target before hitting. This move cannot be copied by Mirror Move, nor selected by Assist or Metronome.
feint.flavorText: This attack can hit a target using a move such as Protect or Detect. This also lifts the effects of those moves.

pluck.name: Pluck
pluck.description: Inflicts regular damage. If the target is holding a berry, this move has double power, and the user takes the berry and uses it immediately. If the target is holding a Jaboca Berry or Rowap Berry, the berry is still removed, but has no effect. If this move is super effective and the target is holding a berry that can reduce this move’s damage, it will do so, and will not be stolen.
pluck.flavorText: The user attacks by pecking the target. If the target is holding a Berry, the user eats it and gains its effect.

tailwind.name: Tailwind
tailwind.description: For the next three turns, all Pokémon on the user’s side of the field have their original Speed doubled. This effect remains if the user leaves the field.
tailwind.flavorText: The user whips up a turbulent whirlwind that boosts the Speed stats of itself and its allies for four turns.

acupressure.name: Acupressure
acupressure.description: Raises one of the target’s stats by two stages. The raised stat is chosen at random from any stats that can be raised by two stages. If no stat is eligible, this move will fail. If the target has a Substitute, this move will have no effect, even if the user is the target. This move cannot be copied by Mirror Move.
acupressure.flavorText: The user applies pressure to stress points, sharply boosting one of its or its allies' stats.

metal-burst.name: Metal Burst
metal-burst.description: Targets the last opposing Pokémon to hit the user with a damaging move this turn. Inflicts 1.5× the damage that move did to the user. If there is no eligible target, this move will fail. Type immunity applies, but other type effects are ignored.
metal-burst.flavorText: The user retaliates with much greater force against the opponent that last inflicted damage on it.

u-turn.name: U Turn
u-turn.description: Inflicts regular damage, then the user immediately switches out, and the trainer selects a replacement Pokémon from the party. If the target faints from this attack, the user’s trainer selects the new Pokémon to send out first. If the user is the last Pokémon in its party that can battle, it will not switch out. The user may be hit by Pursuit when it switches out, if it has been targeted and Pursuit has not yet been used. This move may be used even if the user is under the effect of Ingrain. Ingrain’s effect will end.
u-turn.flavorText: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

close-combat.name: Close Combat
close-combat.description: Inflicts regular damage, then lowers the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage each.
close-combat.flavorText: The user fights the target up close, inflicting damage without guarding itself. This also lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def stats.

payback.name: Payback
payback.description: Inflicts regular damage. If the target uses a move or switches out this turn before this move is used, this move has double power.
payback.flavorText: The user stores power, then attacks. This move's power is doubled if the user moves after the target.

assurance.name: Assurance
assurance.description: Inflicts regular damage. If the target takes damage this turn for any reason before this move is used, this move has double power.
assurance.flavorText: This move's power is doubled if the target has already taken some damage in the same turn.

embargo.name: Embargo
embargo.description: Target cannot use its held item for five turns. If the target leaves the field, this effect ends. If a Pokémon under this effect uses Bug Bite or Pluck on a Pokémon holding a berry, the berry is destroyed but not used. If a Pokémon under this effect uses Fling, it will fail. This effect is passed by Baton Pass.
embargo.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

fling.name: Fling
fling.description: Inflicts regular damage. Power and type are determined by the user’s held item. The item is consumed. If the user is not holding an item, or its item has no set type and power, this move will fail. This move ignores Sticky Hold. If the user is under the effect of Embargo, this move will fail.
fling.flavorText: The user flings its held item at the target to attack. This move's power and effects depend on the item.

psycho-shift.name: Psycho Shift
psycho-shift.description: If the user has a major status effect and the target does not, the user’s status is transferred to the target.
psycho-shift.flavorText: Using its psychic power of suggestion, the user transfers its status conditions to the target.

trump-card.name: Trump Card
trump-card.description: Inflicts regular damage. Power is determined by the PP remaining for this move, after its PP cost is deducted. Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers. PP remaining | Power ------------ | ----: 4 or more | 40 3 | 50 2 | 60 1 | 80 0 | 200 If this move is activated by another move, the activating move’s PP is used to calculate power.
trump-card.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

heal-block.name: Heal Block
heal-block.description: For the next five turns, the target may not use any moves that only restore HP, and move effects that heal the target are disabled. Moves that steal HP may still be used, but will only inflict damage and not heal the target.
heal-block.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

wring-out.name: Wring Out
wring-out.description: Inflicts regular damage. Power directly relates to the target’s relative remaining HP, given by `1 + 120 * current HP / max HP`, to a maximum of 121.
wring-out.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

power-trick.name: Power Trick
power-trick.description: The user’s original Attack and Defense are swapped. This effect is passed on by Baton Pass.
power-trick.flavorText: The user employs its psychic power to switch its Attack stat with its Defense stat.

gastro-acid.name: Gastro Acid
gastro-acid.description: The target’s ability is disabled as long as it remains on the field. This effect is passed on by Baton Pass.
gastro-acid.flavorText: The user hurls up its stomach acids on the target. The fluid eliminates the effect of the target's Ability.

lucky-chant.name: Lucky Chant
lucky-chant.description: For five turns, opposing Pokémon cannot score critical hits.
lucky-chant.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

me-first.name: Me First
me-first.description: If the target has selected a damaging move this turn, the user will copy that move and use it against the target, with a 50% increase in power. If the target moves before the user, this move will fail. This move cannot be copied by Mirror Move, nor selected by Assist, Metronome, or Sleep Talk.
me-first.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

copycat.name: Copycat
copycat.description: Uses the last move that was used successfully by any Pokémon, including the user. This move cannot copy itself, nor Roar nor Whirlwind. This move cannot be copied by Mirror Move, nor selected by Assist, Metronome, or Sleep Talk.
copycat.flavorText: The user mimics the move used immediately before it. The move fails if no other move has been used yet.

power-swap.name: Power Swap
power-swap.description: User swaps its Attack and Special Attack stat modifiers modifiers with the target.
power-swap.flavorText: The user employs its psychic power to switch changes to its Attack and Sp. Atk stats with the target.

guard-swap.name: Guard Swap
guard-swap.description: User swaps its Defense and Special Defense modifiers with the target.
guard-swap.flavorText: The user employs its psychic power to switch changes to its Defense and Sp. Def stats with the target.

punishment.name: Punishment
punishment.description: Inflicts regular damage. Power starts at 60 and is increased by 20 for every stage any of the target’s stats has been raised, capping at 200. Accuracy and evasion modifiers do not increase this move’s power.
punishment.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

last-resort.name: Last Resort
last-resort.description: Inflicts regular damage. This move can only be used if each of the user’s other moves has been used at least once since the user entered the field. If this is the user’s only move, this move will fail.
last-resort.flavorText: This move can be used only after the user has used all the other moves it knows in the battle.

worry-seed.name: Worry Seed
worry-seed.description: Changes the target’s ability to Insomnia. If the target’s ability is Truant or Multitype, this move will fail.
worry-seed.flavorText: A seed that causes worry is planted on the target. It prevents sleep by making the target's Ability Insomnia.

sucker-punch.name: Sucker Punch
sucker-punch.description: Inflicts regular damage. If the target has not selected a damaging move this turn, or if the target has already acted this turn, this move will fail. This move is not affected by Iron Fist.
sucker-punch.flavorText: This move enables the user to attack first. This move fails if the target is not readying an attack.

toxic-spikes.name: Toxic Spikes
toxic-spikes.description: Scatters poisoned spikes around the opposing field, which poison opposing Pokémon that enter the field. A second layer of these spikes may be laid down, in which case Pokémon will be badly poisoned instead. Pokémon immune to either Ground moves or being poisoned are immune to this effect. Pokémon otherwise immune to Ground moves are affected during Gravity. If a Poison Pokémon not immune to Ground moves enters a field covered with poisoned spikes, the spikes are removed. Rapid Spin will remove this effect from its user’s side of the field. Defog will remove this effect from its target’s side of the field. This move does not trigger Synchronize, unless the Pokémon with Synchronize was forced to enter the field by another effect such as Roar. Pokémon entering the field due to Baton Pass are not affected by this effect.
toxic-spikes.flavorText: The user lays a trap of poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team. The spikes will poison opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.

heart-swap.name: Heart Swap
heart-swap.description: User swaps its stat modifiers with the target.
heart-swap.flavorText: The user employs its psychic power to switch stat changes with the target.

aqua-ring.name: Aqua Ring
aqua-ring.description: Restores 1/16 of the user’s max HP at the end of each turn. If the user leaves the field, this effect ends. This effect is passed on by Baton Pass.
aqua-ring.flavorText: The user envelops itself in a veil made of water. It regains some HP every turn.

magnet-rise.name: Magnet Rise
magnet-rise.description: For five turns, the user is immune to Ground moves. If the user is under the effect of Ingrain or has Levitate, this move will fail. This effect is temporarily disabled by and cannot be used during Gravity. This effect is passed on by Baton Pass.
magnet-rise.flavorText: The user levitates using electrically generated magnetism for five turns.

flare-blitz.name: Flare Blitz
flare-blitz.description: Inflicts regular damage. User takes 1/3 the damage it inflicts in recoil. Has a chance to burn the target. Frozen Pokémon may use this move, in which case they will thaw.
flare-blitz.flavorText: The user cloaks itself in fire and charges the target to inflict damage. This also damages the user quite a lot and may leave the target with a burn.

force-palm.name: Force Palm
force-palm.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to paralyze the target.
force-palm.flavorText: The target is attacked with a shock wave. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

aura-sphere.name: Aura Sphere
aura-sphere.description: Inflicts regular damage. Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.
aura-sphere.flavorText: The user lets loose a pulse of aura power from deep within its body at the target. This attack never misses.

rock-polish.name: Rock Polish
rock-polish.description: Raises the user’s Speed by two stages.
rock-polish.flavorText: The user polishes its body to reduce drag. This sharply boosts the user's Speed stat.

poison-jab.name: Poison Jab
poison-jab.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to poison the target.
poison-jab.flavorText: The target is stabbed with a tentacle, an arm, or the like steeped in poison. This may also poison the target.

dark-pulse.name: Dark Pulse
dark-pulse.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to make the target flinch.
dark-pulse.flavorText: The user releases a horrible aura imbued with ill intent. This may also make the target flinch.

night-slash.name: Night Slash
night-slash.description: Inflicts regular damage. User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.
night-slash.flavorText: The user slashes the target the instant an opportunity arises. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

aqua-tail.name: Aqua Tail
aqua-tail.flavorText: The user attacks by swinging its tail as if it were a vicious wave in a raging storm.

seed-bomb.name: Seed Bomb
seed-bomb.flavorText: The user attacks by slamming a barrage of hard-shelled seeds down on the target from above.

air-slash.name: Air Slash
air-slash.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to make the target flinch.
air-slash.flavorText: The user attacks with a blade of air that slices even the sky. This may also make the target flinch.

x-scissor.name: X Scissor
x-scissor.flavorText: The user slashes at the target by crossing its scythes, claws, or the like as if they were a pair of scissors.

bug-buzz.name: Bug Buzz
bug-buzz.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
bug-buzz.flavorText: The user vibrates to generate a damaging sound wave. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

dragon-pulse.name: Dragon Pulse
dragon-pulse.flavorText: The target is attacked with a shock wave generated by the user's gaping mouth.

dragon-rush.name: Dragon Rush
dragon-rush.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to make the target flinch.
dragon-rush.flavorText: The user tackles the target while exhibiting overwhelming menace. This may also make the target flinch.

power-gem.name: Power Gem
power-gem.flavorText: The user attacks with a ray of light that sparkles as if it were made of gemstones.

drain-punch.name: Drain Punch
drain-punch.description: Inflicts regular damage. Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
drain-punch.flavorText: The user attacks with an energy-draining punch. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

vacuum-wave.name: Vacuum Wave
vacuum-wave.flavorText: The user whirls its fists to send a wave of pure vacuum at the target. This move always goes first.

focus-blast.name: Focus Blast
focus-blast.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
focus-blast.flavorText: The user heightens its mental focus and unleashes its power. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

energy-ball.name: Energy Ball
energy-ball.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
energy-ball.flavorText: The user draws power from nature and fires it at the target. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

brave-bird.name: Brave Bird
brave-bird.description: Inflicts regular damage. User takes 1/3 the damage it inflicts in recoil.
brave-bird.flavorText: The user tucks in its wings and charges at a low altitude. This also damages the user quite a lot.

earth-power.name: Earth Power
earth-power.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
earth-power.flavorText: The user makes the ground under the target erupt with power. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

switcheroo.name: Switcheroo
switcheroo.description: User and target permanently swap held items. Works even if one of the Pokémon isn’t holding anything. If either Pokémon is holding mail, this move will fail. If either Pokémon has Multitype or Sticky Hold, this move will fail. If this move results in a Pokémon obtaining Choice Band, Choice Scarf, or Choice Specs, and that Pokémon was the latter of the pair to move this turn, then the move it used this turn becomes its chosen forced move. This applies even if both Pokémon had a choice item before this move was used. If the first of the two Pokémon gains a choice item, it may select whatever choice move it wishes next turn. Neither the user nor the target can recover its item with Recycle. This move cannot be selected by Assist or Metronome.
switcheroo.flavorText: The user trades held items with the target faster than the eye can follow.

giga-impact.name: Giga Impact
giga-impact.description: Inflicts regular damage. User loses its next turn to "recharge", and cannot attack or switch out during that turn.
giga-impact.flavorText: The user charges at the target using every bit of its power. The user can't move on the next turn.

nasty-plot.name: Nasty Plot
nasty-plot.description: Raises the user’s Special Attack by two stages.
nasty-plot.flavorText: The user stimulates its brain by thinking bad thoughts. This sharply boosts the user's Sp. Atk stat.

bullet-punch.name: Bullet Punch
bullet-punch.flavorText: The user strikes the target with tough punches as fast as bullets. This move always goes first.

avalanche.name: Avalanche
avalanche.description: Inflicts regular damage. If the target damaged the user this turn and was the last to do so, this move has double power. Pain Split does not count as damaging the user.
avalanche.flavorText: This move's power is doubled if the target has inflicted damage on the user in the same turn.

ice-shard.name: Ice Shard
ice-shard.flavorText: The user flash-freezes chunks of ice and hurls them at the target. This move always goes first.

shadow-claw.name: Shadow Claw
shadow-claw.description: Inflicts regular damage. User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.
shadow-claw.flavorText: The user attacks by slashing the target with a sharp claw made from shadows. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

thunder-fang.name: Thunder Fang
thunder-fang.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to paralyze the target and a separate chance to make the target flinch.
thunder-fang.flavorText: The user bites with electrified fangs. This may also make the target flinch or leave it with paralysis.

ice-fang.name: Ice Fang
ice-fang.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to freeze the target and a separate chance to make the target flinch.
ice-fang.flavorText: The user bites with cold-infused fangs. This may also make the target flinch or leave it frozen.

fire-fang.name: Fire Fang
fire-fang.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to burn the target and a separate chance to make the target flinch.
fire-fang.flavorText: The user bites with flame-cloaked fangs. This may also make the target flinch or leave it with a burn.

shadow-sneak.name: Shadow Sneak
shadow-sneak.flavorText: The user extends its shadow and attacks the target from behind. This move always goes first.

mud-bomb.name: Mud Bomb
mud-bomb.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.
mud-bomb.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

psycho-cut.name: Psycho Cut
psycho-cut.description: Inflicts regular damage. User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.
psycho-cut.flavorText: The user tears at the target with blades formed by psychic power. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

zen-headbutt.name: Zen Headbutt
zen-headbutt.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to make the target flinch.
zen-headbutt.flavorText: The user focuses its willpower to its head and attacks the target. This may also make the target flinch.

mirror-shot.name: Mirror Shot
mirror-shot.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.
mirror-shot.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

flash-cannon.name: Flash Cannon
flash-cannon.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
flash-cannon.flavorText: The user gathers all its light energy and releases it at once. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

rock-climb.name: Rock Climb
rock-climb.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to confuse the target.
rock-climb.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

defog.name: Defog
defog.description: Lowers the target’s evasion by one stage. Clears away fog. Removes the effects of Mist, Light Screen, Reflect, Safeguard, Spikes, Stealth Rock, and Toxic Spikes from the target’s side of the field. If the target is protected by Mist, it will prevent the evasion change, then be removed by this move.
defog.flavorText: A strong wind blows away the target's barriers such as Reflect or Light Screen. This also lowers the target's evasiveness.

trick-room.name: Trick Room
trick-room.description: For five turns (including this one), slower Pokémon will act before faster Pokémon. Move priority is not affected. Using this move when its effect is already active will end the effect. Pokémon holding Full Incense, Lagging Tail, or Quick Claw and Pokémon with Stall ignore this effect.
trick-room.flavorText: The user creates a bizarre area in which slower Pokémon get to move first for five turns.

draco-meteor.name: Draco Meteor
draco-meteor.description: Inflicts regular damage, then lowers the user’s Special Attack by two stages.
draco-meteor.flavorText: Comets are summoned down from the sky onto the target. The recoil from this move harshly lowers the user’s Sp. Atk stat.

discharge.name: Discharge
discharge.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to paralyze the target.
discharge.flavorText: The user strikes everything around it by letting loose a flare of electricity. This may also leave those hit by the attack with paralysis.

lava-plume.name: Lava Plume
lava-plume.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to burn the target.
lava-plume.flavorText: The user torches everything around it in an inferno of scarlet flames. This may also leave those it hits with a burn.

leaf-storm.name: Leaf Storm
leaf-storm.description: Inflicts regular damage, then lowers the user’s Special Attack by two stages.
leaf-storm.flavorText: The user whips up a storm of leaves around the target. The recoil from this move harshly lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat.

power-whip.name: Power Whip
power-whip.flavorText: The user violently whirls its vines, tentacles, or the like to lash the target.

rock-wrecker.name: Rock Wrecker
rock-wrecker.description: Inflicts regular damage. User loses its next turn to "recharge", and cannot attack or switch out during that turn.
rock-wrecker.flavorText: The user launches a huge boulder at the target to attack. The user can't move on the next turn.

cross-poison.name: Cross Poison
cross-poison.description: Inflicts regular damage. User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move. Has a chance to poison the target.
cross-poison.flavorText: A slashing attack with a poisonous blade that may also poison the target. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

gunk-shot.name: Gunk Shot
gunk-shot.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to poison the target.
gunk-shot.flavorText: The user shoots filthy garbage at the target to attack. This may also poison the target.

iron-head.name: Iron Head
iron-head.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to make the target flinch.
iron-head.flavorText: The user slams the target with its steel-hard head. This may also make the target flinch.

magnet-bomb.name: Magnet Bomb
magnet-bomb.description: Inflicts regular damage. Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.
magnet-bomb.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

stone-edge.name: Stone Edge
stone-edge.description: Inflicts regular damage. User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.
stone-edge.flavorText: The user stabs the target with sharpened stones. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

captivate.name: Captivate
captivate.description: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by two stages. If the user and target are the same gender, or either is genderless, this move will fail.
captivate.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

stealth-rock.name: Stealth Rock
stealth-rock.description: Spreads sharp rocks around the opposing field, damaging any Pokémon that enters the field for 1/8 its max HP. This damage is affected by the entering Pokémon’s susceptibility to Rock moves. Rapid Spin removes this effect from its user’s side of the field.
stealth-rock.flavorText: The user lays a trap of levitating stones around the opposing team. The trap damages opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.

grass-knot.name: Grass Knot
grass-knot.description: Inflicts regular damage. Power increases with the target’s weight in kilograms, to a maximum of 120. Target’s weight | Power --------------- | ----: Up to 10kg | 20 Up to 25kg | 40 Up to 50kg | 60 Up to 100kg | 80 Up to 200kg | 100 Above 200kg | 120
grass-knot.flavorText: The user snares the target with grass and trips it. The heavier the target, the greater the move's power.

chatter.name: Chatter
chatter.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has either a 1%, 11%, or 31% chance to confuse the target, based on the volume of the recording made for this move; louder recordings increase the chance of confusion. If the user is not a Chatot, this move will not cause confusion. This move cannot be copied by Mimic, Mirror Move, or Sketch, nor selected by Assist, Metronome, or Sleep Talk.
chatter.flavorText: The user attacks the target with sound waves of deafening chatter. This confuses the target.

judgment.name: Judgment
judgment.description: Inflicts regular damage. If the user is holding a plate or a drive, this move’s type is the type corresponding to that item. Note: This effect is technically shared by both Techno Blast and Judgment; however, Techno Blast is only affected by drives, and Judgment is only affected by plates.
judgment.flavorText: The user releases countless shots of light at the target. This move's type changes depending on the kind of plate held by the user.

bug-bite.name: Bug Bite
bug-bite.description: Inflicts regular damage. If the target is holding a berry, this move has double power, and the user takes the berry and uses it immediately. If the target is holding a Jaboca Berry or Rowap Berry, the berry is still removed, but has no effect. If this move is super effective and the target is holding a berry that can reduce this move’s damage, it will do so, and will not be stolen.
bug-bite.flavorText: The user attacks by biting the target. If the target is holding a Berry, the user eats it and gains its effect.

charge-beam.name: Charge Beam
charge-beam.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to raise the user’s Special Attack by one stage.
charge-beam.flavorText: The user attacks the target with an electric charge. The residual electricity may also boost the user's Sp. Atk stat.

wood-hammer.name: Wood Hammer
wood-hammer.description: Inflicts regular damage. User takes 1/3 the damage it inflicts in recoil.
wood-hammer.flavorText: The user slams its rugged body into the target to attack. This also damages the user quite a lot.

aqua-jet.name: Aqua Jet
aqua-jet.flavorText: The user lunges at the target to inflict damage, moving at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

attack-order.name: Attack Order
attack-order.description: Inflicts regular damage. User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.
attack-order.flavorText: The user calls out its underlings to pummel the target. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

defend-order.name: Defend Order
defend-order.description: Raises the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage.
defend-order.flavorText: The user calls out its underlings to shield its body, boosting its Defense and Sp. Def stats.

heal-order.name: Heal Order
heal-order.description: Heals the user for half its max HP.
heal-order.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

head-smash.name: Head Smash
head-smash.description: Inflicts regular damage. User takes 1/2 the damage it inflicts in recoil.
head-smash.flavorText: The user attacks the target with a hazardous full-power headbutt. This also damages the user terribly.

double-hit.name: Double Hit
double-hit.description: Inflicts regular damage. Hits twice in one turn.
double-hit.flavorText: The user slams the target with a tail or the like. The target is hit twice in a row.

roar-of-time.name: Roar Of Time
roar-of-time.description: Inflicts regular damage. User loses its next turn to "recharge", and cannot attack or switch out during that turn.
roar-of-time.flavorText: The user blasts the target with power that distorts even time. The user can't move on the next turn.

spacial-rend.name: Spacial Rend
spacial-rend.description: Inflicts regular damage. User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.
