spacial-rend.flavorText: The user tears the target along with the space around it. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

lunar-dance.name: Lunar Dance
lunar-dance.description: User faints. Its replacement’s HP and PP are fully restored, and any major status effect is removed.
lunar-dance.flavorText: The user faints. In return, the Pokémon taking its place will have its HP and PP restored and its status conditions cured.

crush-grip.name: Crush Grip
crush-grip.description: Inflicts regular damage. Power directly relates to the target’s relative remaining HP, given by `1 + 120 * current HP / max HP`, to a maximum of 121.
crush-grip.flavorText: The target is crushed with great force. The more HP the target has left, the greater the move's power.

magma-storm.name: Magma Storm
magma-storm.description: Inflicts regular damage. For the next 2–5 turns, the target cannot leave the field and is damaged for 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn. The user continues to use other moves during this time. If the user leaves the field, this effect ends. Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times. Averages to 3 hits per use. Rapid Spin cancels this effect.
magma-storm.flavorText: The user traps the target inside a maelstrom of fire that inflicts damage for four to five turns.

dark-void.name: Dark Void
dark-void.flavorText: Opposing Pokémon are dragged into a world of total darkness that puts them to sleep.

seed-flare.name: Seed Flare
seed-flare.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by two stages.
seed-flare.flavorText: The user emits a shock wave from its body to attack its target. This may also harshly lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

ominous-wind.name: Ominous Wind
ominous-wind.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to raise all of the user’s stats one stage.
ominous-wind.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

shadow-force.name: Shadow Force
shadow-force.description: Inflicts regular damage. User vanishes for one turn, becoming immune to attack, and hits on the second turn. This move ignores the effects of Detect and Protect. This move cannot be selected by Sleep Talk.
shadow-force.flavorText: The user disappears on the first turn, then attacks on the next turn. This move hits even if the target protects itself.

hone-claws.name: Hone Claws
hone-claws.description: Raises the user’s Attack and accuracy by one stage.
hone-claws.flavorText: The user sharpens its claws to boost its Attack stat and accuracy.

wide-guard.name: Wide Guard
wide-guard.description: Moves with multiple targets will not hit friendly Pokémon for the remainder of this turn. If the user is last to act this turn, this move will fail. This move cannot be selected by Assist or Metronome.
wide-guard.flavorText: The user and its allies are protected from wide-ranging attacks for one turn.

guard-split.name: Guard Split
guard-split.description: Averages the user’s unmodified Defense with the target’s unmodified Defense; the value becomes the unmodified Defense for both Pokémon. Unmodified Special Defense is averaged the same way.
guard-split.flavorText: The user employs its psychic power to average its Defense and Sp. Def stats with those of the target.

power-split.name: Power Split
power-split.description: Averages the user’s unmodified Attack with the target’s unmodified Attack; the value becomes the unmodified Attack for both Pokémon. Unmodified Special Attack is averaged the same way. This effect applies before any other persistent changes to unmodified Attack or Special Attack, such as Flower Gift during Sunny Day.
power-split.flavorText: The user employs its psychic power to average its Attack and Sp. Atk stats with those of the target.

wonder-room.name: Wonder Room
wonder-room.description: For five turns (including this one), every Pokémon’s Defense and Special Defense are swapped.
wonder-room.flavorText: The user creates a bizarre area in which Pokémon's Defense and Sp. Def stats are swapped for five turns.

psyshock.name: Psyshock
psyshock.description: Inflicts regular damage. Damage calculation always uses the target’s Defense, regardless of this move’s damage class.
psyshock.flavorText: The user materializes an odd psychic wave to attack the target. This move deals physical damage.

venoshock.name: Venoshock
venoshock.description: Inflicts regular damage. If the target is poisoned, this move has double power.
venoshock.flavorText: The user drenches the target in a special poisonous liquid. This move's power is doubled if the target is poisoned.

autotomize.name: Autotomize
autotomize.description: Raises the user’s Speed by two stages. Halves the user’s weight; this effect does not stack.
autotomize.flavorText: The user sheds part of its body to make itself lighter and sharply raise its Speed stat.

rage-powder.name: Rage Powder
rage-powder.description: Until the end of this turn, any moves that opposing Pokémon target solely at the user’s ally will instead target the user. If both Pokémon on the same side of the field use this move on the same turn, the Pokémon that uses it last will become the target. This effect takes priority over Lightning Rod and Storm Drain. If the user’s ally switches out, opposing Pokémon may still hit it with Pursuit. This move cannot be selected by Assist or Metronome.
rage-powder.flavorText: The user scatters a cloud of irritating powder to draw attention to itself. Opposing Pokémon aim only at the user.

telekinesis.name: Telekinesis
telekinesis.description: For three turns (including this one), moves used against the target have 100% accuracy, but the target is immune to Ground damage. Accuracy of one-hit KO moves is exempt from this effect. This effect is removed by Gravity. If Gravity is already in effect, this move will fail.
telekinesis.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

magic-room.name: Magic Room
magic-room.description: For five turns (including this one), passive effects of held items are ignored, and Pokémon will not use their held items.
magic-room.flavorText: The user creates a bizarre area in which Pokémon's held items lose their effects for five turns.

smack-down.name: Smack Down
smack-down.description: Inflicts regular damage. Removes the target’s immunity to Ground-type damage. This effect removes any existing Ground immunity due to Levitate, Magnet Rise, or Telekinesis, and causes the target’s Flying type to be ignored when it takes Ground damage. If the target isn’t immune to Ground damage, this move will fail. This move can hit Pokémon under the effect of Bounce, Fly, or Sky Drop, and ends the effect of Bounce or Fly.
smack-down.flavorText: The user throws a stone or similar projectile to attack the target. If the target is in the air, it will be knocked down to the ground.

storm-throw.name: Storm Throw
storm-throw.description: Inflicts regular damage. Always scores a critical hit.
storm-throw.flavorText: The user strikes the target with a fierce blow. This attack always results in a critical hit.

flame-burst.name: Flame Burst
flame-burst.description: Inflicts regular damage. If this move successfully hits the target, any Pokémon adjacent to the target are damaged for 1/16 their max HP.
flame-burst.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

sludge-wave.name: Sludge Wave
sludge-wave.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to poison the target.
sludge-wave.flavorText: The user strikes everything around it by swamping the area with a giant sludge wave. This may also poison those it hits.

quiver-dance.name: Quiver Dance
quiver-dance.description: Raises the user’s Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed by one stage each.
quiver-dance.flavorText: The user lightly performs a beautiful, mystic dance. This boosts the user's Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed stats.

heavy-slam.name: Heavy Slam
heavy-slam.description: Inflicts regular damage. The greater the user’s weight compared to the target’s, the higher power this move has, to a maximum of 120. User’s weight | Power -------------------------------- | ----: Up to 2× the target’s weight | 40 Up to 3× the target’s weight | 60 Up to 4× the target’s weight | 80 Up to 5× the target’s weight | 100 More than 5× the target’s weight | 120
heavy-slam.flavorText: The user slams into the target with its heavy body. The more the user outweighs the target, the greater the move's power.

synchronoise.name: Synchronoise
synchronoise.description: Inflicts regular damage. Only Pokémon that share a type with the user will take damage from this move.
synchronoise.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

electro-ball.name: Electro Ball
electro-ball.description: Inflicts regular damage. The greater the user’s Speed compared to the target’s, the higher power this move has, to a maximum of 150. User’s Speed | Power -------------------------------- | ----: Up to 2× the target’s Speed | 60 Up to 3× the target’s Speed | 80 Up to 4× the target’s Speed | 120 More than 4× the target’s Speed | 150
electro-ball.flavorText: The user hurls an electric orb at the target. The faster the user is than the target, the greater the move's power.

soak.name: Soak
soak.description: Changes the target to pure Water-type until it leaves the field. If the target has Multitype, this move will fail.
soak.flavorText: The user shoots a torrent of water that changes the target's type to Water.

flame-charge.name: Flame Charge
flame-charge.description: Inflicts regular damage. Raises the user’s Speed by one stage.
flame-charge.flavorText: Cloaking itself in flame, the user attacks the target. Then, building up momentum, the user boosts its Speed stat.

coil.name: Coil
coil.description: Raises the user’s Attack, Defense, and accuracy by one stage each.
coil.flavorText: The user coils up and concentrates. This boosts its Attack and Defense stats as well as its accuracy.

low-sweep.name: Low Sweep
low-sweep.description: Lowers the target’s Speed by one stage.
low-sweep.flavorText: The user makes a swift attack on the target's legs, which lowers the target's Speed stat.

acid-spray.name: Acid Spray
acid-spray.description: Inflicts regular damage. Lowers the target’s Special Defense by two stages.
acid-spray.flavorText: The user attacks by spitting fluid that works to melt the target. This also harshly lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.

foul-play.name: Foul Play
foul-play.description: Inflicts regular damage. Damage is calculated using the target’s attacking stat rather than the user’s.
foul-play.flavorText: The user turns the target's strength against it. The higher the target's Attack stat, the greater the damage this move inflicts.

simple-beam.name: Simple Beam
simple-beam.description: Changes the target’s ability to Simple.
simple-beam.flavorText: The user emits a mysterious psychic wave that changes the target's Ability to Simple.

entrainment.name: Entrainment
entrainment.description: Changes the target’s ability to match the user’s. This effect ends when the target leaves battle.
entrainment.flavorText: The user dances with an odd rhythm that compels the target to mimic it, making the target's Ability the same as the user's.

after-you.name: After You
after-you.description: The target will act next this turn, regardless of Speed or move priority. If the target has already acted this turn, this move will fail.
after-you.flavorText: The user helps the target and makes it use its move right after the user.

round.name: Round
round.description: Inflicts regular damage. If Round has already been used this turn, this move’s power is doubled. After this move is used, any other Pokémon using it this turn will immediately do so (in the order they would otherwise act), regardless of Speed or priority. Pokémon using other moves will then continue to act as usual.
round.flavorText: The user attacks the target with a song. If others use this move, they will act immediately after the initial user, and the power of their Rounds will be boosted.

echoed-voice.name: Echoed Voice
echoed-voice.description: Inflicts regular damage. If any friendly Pokémon used this move earlier this turn or on the previous turn, that use’s power is added to this move’s power, to a maximum of 200.
echoed-voice.flavorText: The user attacks the target with an echoing voice. If this move is used consecutively by any Pokémon, its power is boosted.

chip-away.name: Chip Away
chip-away.description: Inflicts regular damage. Damage calculation ignores the target’s stat modifiers, including evasion.
chip-away.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

clear-smog.name: Clear Smog
clear-smog.description: Inflicts regular damage. All of the target’s stat modifiers are reset to zero.
clear-smog.flavorText: The user attacks the target by throwing a clump of special mud. All stat changes are eliminated.

stored-power.name: Stored Power
stored-power.description: Inflicts regular damage. Power is increased by 100% its original value for every stage any of the user’s stats have been raised. Accuracy, evasion, and lowered stats do not affect this move’s power. For a Pokémon with all five stats modified to +6, this move’s power is 31×.
stored-power.flavorText: The user attacks the target with stored power. The more the user's stats are boosted, the greater the move's power.

quick-guard.name: Quick Guard
quick-guard.description: Moves with priority greater than 0 will not hit friendly Pokémon for the remainder of this turn. If the user is last to act this turn, this move will fail. This move cannot be selected by Assist or Metronome.
quick-guard.flavorText: The user protects itself and its allies from priority moves.

ally-switch.name: Ally Switch
ally-switch.description: User switches position on the field with the friendly Pokémon opposite it. If the user is in the middle position in a triple battle, or there are no other friendly Pokémon, this move will fail.
ally-switch.flavorText: The user teleports using a strange power and switches places with one of its allies. This move's chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

scald.name: Scald
scald.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to burn the target.
scald.flavorText: The user attacks by shooting boiling hot water at the target. This may also leave the target with a burn.

shell-smash.name: Shell Smash
shell-smash.description: Raises the user’s Attack, Special Attack, and Speed by two stages each. Lowers the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage each.
shell-smash.flavorText: The user breaks its shell, which lowers its Defense and Sp. Def stats but sharply boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats.

heal-pulse.name: Heal Pulse
heal-pulse.description: Heals the target for half its max HP.
heal-pulse.flavorText: The user emits a healing pulse that restores the target's HP by up to half its max HP.

hex.name: Hex
hex.description: Inflicts regular damage. If the target has a major status ailment, this move has double power.
hex.flavorText: This relentless attack does massive damage to a target affected by status conditions.

sky-drop.name: Sky Drop
sky-drop.description: Inflicts regular damage. User carries the target high into the air for one turn, during which no moves will hit either Pokémon and neither can act. On the following turn, the user drops the target, inflicting damage and ending the effect. If the target is Flying-type, this move will function as normal but inflict no damage. Gust, Hurricane, Sky Uppercut, Smack Down, Thunder, Twister, and Whirlwind can hit both the user and the target during this effect. Gust and Twister will additionally have double power. The damage from Hail and Sandstorm still applies during this effect. Either Pokémon may be hit during this effect if also under the effect of Lock-On, Mind Reader, or No Guard. This move cannot be used while Gravity is in effect. This move cannot be selected by Sleep Talk. *Bug*: If Gravity is used during a double or triple battle while this move is in effect, this move is not correctly canceled on the target, and it remains high in the air indefinitely. As this move prevents the target from acting, the only way to subsequently remove it from the field is to faint it.
sky-drop.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

shift-gear.name: Shift Gear
shift-gear.description: Raises the user’s Attack by one stage and its Speed by two stages.
shift-gear.flavorText: The user rotates its gears, boosting its Attack stat and sharply boosting its Speed stat.

circle-throw.name: Circle Throw
circle-throw.description: Inflicts regular damage, then switches the target out for another of its trainer’s Pokémon, selected at random. If the target is under the effect of Ingrain or Suction Cups, or it has a Substitute, or its Trainer has no more usable Pokémon, it will not be switched out. If the target is a wild Pokémon, the battle ends instead.
circle-throw.flavorText: The target is thrown, and a different Pokémon is dragged out. In the wild, this ends a battle against a single Pokémon.

incinerate.name: Incinerate
incinerate.description: Inflicts regular damage. If the target is holding a berry, it’s destroyed and cannot be used in response to this move.
incinerate.flavorText: The user attacks opposing Pokémon with fire. If a Pokémon is holding a certain item, such as a Berry, the item becomes burned up and unusable.

quash.name: Quash
quash.description: Forces the target to act last this turn, regardless of Speed or move priority. If the target has already acted this turn, this move will fail.
quash.flavorText: The user suppresses the target and makes its move go last.

acrobatics.name: Acrobatics
acrobatics.description: Inflicts regular damage. If the user has no held item, this move has double power.
acrobatics.flavorText: The user nimbly strikes the target. This attack does massive damage if the user isn't holding an item.

reflect-type.name: Reflect Type
reflect-type.description: User’s type changes to match the target’s.
reflect-type.flavorText: The user reflects the target's type to become the same type as the target.

retaliate.name: Retaliate
retaliate.description: Inflicts regular damage. If a friendly Pokémon fainted on the previous turn, this move has double power.
retaliate.flavorText: The user takes revenge for a fainted ally. This move's power is boosted if an ally fainted in the previous turn.

final-gambit.name: Final Gambit
final-gambit.description: Inflicts damage equal to the user’s remaining HP. User faints.
final-gambit.flavorText: The user risks everything to attack the target. The user faints but inflicts damage equal to its own HP.

bestow.name: Bestow
bestow.description: Transfers the user’s held item to the target. If the user has no held item, or the target already has a held item, this move will fail.
bestow.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

inferno.name: Inferno
inferno.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to burn the target.
inferno.flavorText: The user attacks by engulfing the target in an intense fire. This leaves the target with a burn.

water-pledge.name: Water Pledge
water-pledge.description: Inflicts regular damage. If a friendly Pokémon used Grass Pledge earlier this turn, all opposing Pokémon have halved Speed for four turns (including this one).
water-pledge.flavorText: A column of water hits the target. When used with its fire counterpart, this move's power is boosted and a rainbow appears.

fire-pledge.name: Fire Pledge
fire-pledge.description: Inflicts regular damage. If a friendly Pokémon used Water Pledge earlier this turn, moves used by any friendly Pokémon have doubled effect chance for four turns (including this one).
fire-pledge.flavorText: A column of fire hits the target. When used with its grass counterpart, this move's power is boosted and a vast sea of fire appears.

grass-pledge.name: Grass Pledge
grass-pledge.description: Inflicts regular damage. If a friendly Pokémon used Fire Pledge earlier this turn, all opposing Pokémon will take 1/8 their max HP in damage at the end of every turn for four turns (including this one).
grass-pledge.flavorText: A column of grass hits the target. When used with its water counterpart, this move's power is boosted and a vast swamp appears.

volt-switch.name: Volt Switch
volt-switch.description: Inflicts regular damage, then the user immediately switches out, and the trainer selects a replacement Pokémon from the party. If the target faints from this attack, the user’s trainer selects the new Pokémon to send out first. If the user is the last Pokémon in its party that can battle, it will not switch out. The user may be hit by Pursuit when it switches out, if it has been targeted and Pursuit has not yet been used. This move may be used even if the user is under the effect of Ingrain. Ingrain’s effect will end.
volt-switch.flavorText: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

struggle-bug.name: Struggle Bug
struggle-bug.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.
struggle-bug.flavorText: The user attacks by struggling against opposing Pokémon. This also lowers their Sp. Atk stats.

bulldoze.name: Bulldoze
bulldoze.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
bulldoze.flavorText: The user strikes everything around it by stomping down on the ground. This lowers the Speed stats of those hit.

frost-breath.name: Frost Breath
frost-breath.description: Inflicts regular damage. Always scores a critical hit.
frost-breath.flavorText: The user attacks by blowing its cold breath on the target. This move always lands a critical hit.

dragon-tail.name: Dragon Tail
dragon-tail.description: Inflicts regular damage, then switches the target out for another of its trainer’s Pokémon, selected at random. If the target is under the effect of Ingrain or Suction Cups, or it has a Substitute, or its Trainer has no more usable Pokémon, it will not be switched out. If the target is a wild Pokémon, the battle ends instead.
dragon-tail.flavorText: The target is knocked away, and a different Pokémon is dragged out. In the wild, this ends a battle against a single Pokémon.

work-up.name: Work Up
work-up.description: Raises the user’s Attack and Special Attack by one stage each.
work-up.flavorText: The user is roused, and its Attack and Sp. Atk stats are boosted.

electroweb.name: Electroweb
electroweb.description: Lowers the target’s Speed by one stage.
electroweb.flavorText: The user captures opposing Pokémon in an electric net to inflict damage. This also lowers their Speed stats.

wild-charge.name: Wild Charge
wild-charge.description: Inflicts regular damage. User takes 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.
wild-charge.flavorText: The user shrouds itself in electricity and smashes into its target. This also damages the user a little.

drill-run.name: Drill Run
drill-run.description: Inflicts regular damage. User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.
drill-run.flavorText: The user crashes into the target while rotating its body like a drill. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

dual-chop.name: Dual Chop
dual-chop.description: Inflicts regular damage. Hits twice in one turn.
dual-chop.flavorText: The user attacks its target by hitting it with brutal strikes. The target is hit twice in a row.

heart-stamp.name: Heart Stamp
heart-stamp.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to make the target flinch.
heart-stamp.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

horn-leech.name: Horn Leech
horn-leech.description: Inflicts regular damage. Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
horn-leech.flavorText: The user drains the target's energy with its horns. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

sacred-sword.name: Sacred Sword
sacred-sword.description: Inflicts regular damage. Damage calculation ignores the target’s stat modifiers, including evasion.
sacred-sword.flavorText: The user attacks by slicing with a sword. The target's stat changes don't affect the damage inflicted by this move.

razor-shell.name: Razor Shell
razor-shell.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
razor-shell.flavorText: The user cuts the target with sharp shells to inflict damage. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

heat-crash.name: Heat Crash
heat-crash.description: Inflicts regular damage. The greater the user’s weight compared to the target’s, the higher power this move has, to a maximum of 120. User’s weight | Power -------------------------------- | ----: Up to 2× the target’s weight | 40 Up to 3× the target’s weight | 60 Up to 4× the target’s weight | 80 Up to 5× the target’s weight | 100 More than 5× the target’s weight | 120
heat-crash.flavorText: The user slams into the target with its flame-covered body. The more the user outweighs the target, the greater the move's power.

leaf-tornado.name: Leaf Tornado
leaf-tornado.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.
leaf-tornado.flavorText: The user attacks its target by encircling it in sharp leaves. This attack may also lower the target’s accuracy.

steamroller.name: Steamroller
steamroller.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to make the target flinch. Power is doubled against Pokémon that have used Minimize since entering the field.
steamroller.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

cotton-guard.name: Cotton Guard
cotton-guard.description: Raises the user’s Defense by three stages.
cotton-guard.flavorText: The user protects itself by wrapping its body in soft cotton, drastically boosting its Defense stat.

night-daze.name: Night Daze
night-daze.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.
night-daze.flavorText: The user looses a pitch-black shock wave at the target to inflict damage. This may also lower the target's accuracy.

psystrike.name: Psystrike
psystrike.description: Inflicts regular damage. Damage calculation always uses the target’s Defense, regardless of this move’s damage class.
psystrike.flavorText: The user materializes an odd psychic wave to attack the target. This move deals physical damage.

tail-slap.name: Tail Slap
tail-slap.description: Inflicts regular damage. Hits 2–5 times in one turn. Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times. Averages to 3 hits per use.
tail-slap.flavorText: The user attacks by striking the target with its hard tail. This move hits two to five times in a row.

hurricane.name: Hurricane
hurricane.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to confuse the target. This move can hit Pokémon under the effect of Bounce, Fly, or Sky Drop. During Rain Dance, this move has 100% accuracy. During Sunny Day, this move has 50% accuracy.
hurricane.flavorText: The user attacks by wrapping its opponent in a fierce wind. This may also confuse the target.

head-charge.name: Head Charge
head-charge.description: Inflicts regular damage. User takes 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.
head-charge.flavorText: The user charges its head into its target, using its powerful guard hair. This also damages the user a little.

gear-grind.name: Gear Grind
gear-grind.description: Inflicts regular damage. Hits twice in one turn.
gear-grind.flavorText: The user attacks by throwing steel gears at its target twice.

searing-shot.name: Searing Shot
searing-shot.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to burn the target.
searing-shot.flavorText: The user torches everything around it in an inferno of scarlet flames. This may also leave those it hits with a burn.

techno-blast.name: Techno Blast
techno-blast.description: Inflicts regular damage. If the user is holding a plate or a drive, this move’s type is the type corresponding to that item. Note: This effect is technically shared by both Techno Blast and Judgment; however, Techno Blast is only affected by drives, and Judgment is only affected by plates.
techno-blast.flavorText: The user fires a beam of light at its target. The move’s type changes depending on the Drive the user holds.

relic-song.name: Relic Song
relic-song.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to put the target to sleep. If the user is a Meloetta, it will toggle between Aria and Pirouette Forme.
relic-song.flavorText: The user sings an ancient song and attacks by appealing to the hearts of the listening opposing Pokémon. This may also induce sleep.

secret-sword.name: Secret Sword
secret-sword.description: Inflicts regular damage. Damage calculation always uses the target’s Defense, regardless of this move’s damage class.
secret-sword.flavorText: The user cuts with its long horn. The odd power contained in the horn deals physical damage to the target.

glaciate.name: Glaciate
glaciate.description: Inflicts regular damage. Lowers the target’s Speed by one stage.
glaciate.flavorText: The user attacks by blowing freezing cold air at opposing Pokémon. This also lowers their Speed stats.

bolt-strike.name: Bolt Strike
bolt-strike.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to paralyze the target.
bolt-strike.flavorText: The user surrounds itself with a great amount of electricity and charges the target. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

blue-flare.name: Blue Flare
blue-flare.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to burn the target.
blue-flare.flavorText: The user attacks by engulfing the target in an intense, yet beautiful, blue flame. This may also leave the target with a burn.

fiery-dance.name: Fiery Dance
fiery-dance.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to raise the user’s Special Attack by one stage.
fiery-dance.flavorText: Cloaked in flames, the user attacks the target by dancing and flapping its wings. This may also boost the user's Sp. Atk stat.

freeze-shock.name: Freeze Shock
freeze-shock.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to paralyze the target. User charges for one turn before attacking.
freeze-shock.flavorText: The turn after using this move, the user hits the target with electrically charged ice to inflict damage. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

ice-burn.name: Ice Burn
ice-burn.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to burn the target. User charges for one turn before attacking.
ice-burn.flavorText: The turn after using this move, the user surrounds the target with an ultracold, freezing wind to inflict damage. This may also leave the target with a burn.

snarl.name: Snarl
snarl.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.
snarl.flavorText: The user yells as if it's ranting about something, which lowers the Sp. Atk stats of opposing Pokémon.

icicle-crash.name: Icicle Crash
icicle-crash.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to make the target flinch.
icicle-crash.flavorText: The user attacks by crashing large icicles onto the target. This may also make the target flinch.

v-create.name: V Create
v-create.description: Inflicts regular damage. Lowers the user’s Defense, Special Defense, and Speed by one stage each.
v-create.flavorText: With a hot flame on its forehead, the user hurls itself at its target. This lowers the user’s Defense, Sp. Def, and Speed stats.

fusion-flare.name: Fusion Flare
fusion-flare.description: Inflicts regular damage. If a friendly Pokémon used Fusion Bolt earlier this turn, this move has double power.
fusion-flare.flavorText: The user brings down a giant flame. This move's power is boosted when influenced by an enormous lightning bolt.

fusion-bolt.name: Fusion Bolt
fusion-bolt.description: Inflicts regular damage. If a friendly Pokémon used Fusion Flare earlier this turn, this move has double power.
fusion-bolt.flavorText: The user throws down a giant lightning bolt. This move's power is boosted when influenced by an enormous flame.

flying-press.name: Flying Press
flying-press.description: Inflicts regular damage. For the purposes of type effectiveness, this move is both Fighting- and Flying-type: its final effectiveness is determined by multiplying the effectiveness of each type against each of the target’s types. For all other purposes, this move is pure Fighting-type. If this move’s type is changed, its Fighting typing is overwritten, and its secondary type remains Flying. If the target has used Minimize since entering battle, this move has double power and will never miss.
flying-press.flavorText: The user dives down onto the target from the sky. This move is Fighting and Flying type simultaneously.

mat-block.name: Mat Block
mat-block.description: Protects all friendly Pokémon from damaging moves. Only works on the first turn after the user is sent out.
mat-block.flavorText: Using a pulled-up mat as a shield, the user protects itself and its allies from damaging moves. This does not stop status moves.

belch.name: Belch
belch.description: Inflicts regular damage. Can only be used if the user has eaten a berry since the beginning of the battle. After the user eats a berry, it may use this move any number of times until the end of the battle, even if it switches out. Eating a held berry, eating a berry via Bug Bite or Pluck, or being the target of a Flung berry will enable this move. Feeding a Pokémon a berry from the bag or using Natural Gift will not. If the trainer chooses this move when it cannot be used, the choice is rejected outright and the trainer must choose another move.
belch.flavorText: The user lets out a damaging belch at the target. The user must eat a held Berry to use this move.

rototiller.name: Rototiller
rototiller.description: Raises the Attack and Special Attack of all Grass Pokémon in battle.
rototiller.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

sticky-web.name: Sticky Web
sticky-web.description: Shoots a web over the opponents’ side of the field, which lowers the Speed of any opposing Pokémon that enters the field by one stage. Pokémon in the air, such as Flying-types and those with Levitate, are unaffected. Rapid Spin removes Sticky Web from the user’s side of the field; Defog removes it from both sides.
sticky-web.flavorText: The user weaves a sticky net around the opposing team, which lowers their Speed stats upon switching into battle.

fell-stinger.name: Fell Stinger
fell-stinger.description: Inflicts regular damage. Raises the user’s Attack by two stages if it KOs the target.
fell-stinger.flavorText: When the user knocks out a target with this move, the user's Attack stat is boosted drastically.

phantom-force.name: Phantom Force
phantom-force.description: Inflicts regular damage. User vanishes for one turn, becoming immune to attack, and hits on the second turn. This move ignores the effects of Detect and Protect. This move cannot be selected by Sleep Talk.
phantom-force.flavorText: The user vanishes somewhere, then strikes the target on the next turn. This move hits even if the target protects itself.

trick-or-treat.name: Trick Or Treat
trick-or-treat.description: Adds Ghost to the target’s types.
trick-or-treat.flavorText: The user takes the target trick-or-treating. This adds Ghost type to the target’s type.

noble-roar.name: Noble Roar
noble-roar.description: Lowers the target’s Attack and Special Attack by one stage.
noble-roar.flavorText: Letting out a noble roar, the user intimidates the target and lowers the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats.

ion-deluge.name: Ion Deluge
ion-deluge.description: Changes all Pokémon’s Normal moves to Electric moves for the rest of the turn.
ion-deluge.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

parabolic-charge.name: Parabolic Charge
parabolic-charge.description: Heals the user for half the total damage dealt to all targets.
parabolic-charge.flavorText: The user attacks everything around it. The user's HP is restored by half the damage taken by those hit.

forests-curse.name: Forests Curse
forests-curse.description: Adds Grass to the target’s types.
forests-curse.flavorText: The user puts a forest curse on the target. This adds Grass type to the target's type.

petal-blizzard.name: Petal Blizzard
petal-blizzard.flavorText: The user stirs up a violent petal blizzard and damages everything around it.

freeze-dry.name: Freeze Dry
freeze-dry.description: Inflicts regular damage. This move is super-effective against the Water type. The target’s other type will affect damage as usual. If this move’s type is changed, it remains super-effective against Water regardless of its type.
freeze-dry.flavorText: The user rapidly cools the target. This may also leave the target frozen. This move is super effective on Water types.

disarming-voice.name: Disarming Voice
disarming-voice.description: Inflicts regular damage. Ignores accuracy and evasion.
disarming-voice.flavorText: Letting out a charming cry, the user does emotional damage to opposing Pokémon. This attack never misses.

parting-shot.name: Parting Shot
parting-shot.description: Lowers all targets’ Attack and Special Attack by one stage. Makes the user switch out.
parting-shot.flavorText: With a parting threat, the user lowers the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats. Then it switches places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

topsy-turvy.name: Topsy Turvy
topsy-turvy.flavorText: All stat changes affecting the target turn topsy-turvy and become the opposite of what they were.

draining-kiss.name: Draining Kiss
draining-kiss.description: Deals regular damage. Drains 75% of the damage inflicted to heal the user.
draining-kiss.flavorText: The user steals the target's HP with a kiss. The user's HP is restored by over half the damage taken by the target.

crafty-shield.name: Crafty Shield
crafty-shield.description: Protects all friendly Pokémon from non-damaging moves for the rest of the turn. Unlike other blocking moves, this move may be used consecutively without its chance of success falling.
crafty-shield.flavorText: The user protects itself and its allies from status moves with a mysterious power. This does not stop moves that do damage.

flower-shield.name: Flower Shield
flower-shield.description: Raises the Defense of all Grass Pokémon in battle.
flower-shield.flavorText: The user raises the Defense stats of all Grass-type Pokémon in battle with a mysterious power.

grassy-terrain.name: Grassy Terrain
grassy-terrain.description: For five turns, heals all Pokémon on the ground for 1/16 their max HP each turn and strengthens their Grass moves to 1.5× their power. Changes Nature Power to Energy Ball.
grassy-terrain.flavorText: The user turns the ground into Grassy Terrain for five turns. This restores the HP of Pokémon on the ground a little every turn and powers up Grass-type moves.

misty-terrain.name: Misty Terrain
misty-terrain.description: For five turns, protects all Pokémon on the ground from major status ailments and confusion and weakens Dragon moves used against them to 0.5× their power. Changes Nature Power to Moonblast.
misty-terrain.flavorText: This protects Pokémon on the ground from status conditions and halves damage from Dragon-type moves for five turns.

electrify.name: Electrify
electrify.description: Changes the target’s move’s type to Electric if it hasn’t moved yet this turn.
electrify.flavorText: If the target is electrified before it uses a move during that turn, the target’s move becomes Electric type.

play-rough.name: Play Rough
play-rough.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to lower the target’s Attack by one stage.
play-rough.flavorText: The user attacks by playing rough with the target. This may also lower the target's Attack stat.

fairy-wind.name: Fairy Wind
fairy-wind.flavorText: The user attacks by stirring up a fairy wind to strike the target.

moonblast.name: Moonblast
moonblast.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.
moonblast.flavorText: Borrowing the power of the moon, the user attacks the target. This may also lower the target's Sp. Atk stat.

boomburst.name: Boomburst
boomburst.flavorText: The user attacks everything around it with the destructive power of a terrible explosive sound.

fairy-lock.name: Fairy Lock
fairy-lock.description: Prevents all Pokémon from fleeing or switching out during the next turn.
fairy-lock.flavorText: By locking down the battlefield, the user keeps all Pokémon from fleeing during the next turn.

kings-shield.name: Kings Shield
kings-shield.description: Blocks damaging attacks and lowers attacking Pokémon’s Attack by two stages on contact. Switches Aegislash to Shield Forme.
kings-shield.flavorText: The user takes a defensive stance while it protects itself from damage. It also lowers the Attack stat of any attacker that makes direct contact.

play-nice.name: Play Nice
play-nice.description: Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage.
play-nice.flavorText: The user and the target become friends, and the target loses its will to fight. This lowers the target's Attack stat.

confide.name: Confide
confide.description: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by one stage.
confide.flavorText: The user tells the target a secret, and the target loses its ability to concentrate. This lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

diamond-storm.name: Diamond Storm
diamond-storm.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to raise the user’s Defense by two stages for each target hit.
diamond-storm.flavorText: The user whips up a storm of diamonds to damage opposing Pokémon. This may also sharply boost the user's Defense stat.

steam-eruption.name: Steam Eruption
steam-eruption.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to burn the target.
steam-eruption.flavorText: The user immerses the target in superheated steam. This may also leave the target with a burn.

hyperspace-hole.name: Hyperspace Hole
hyperspace-hole.description: Inflicts regular damage. Bypasses and removes any protection effect on the target.
hyperspace-hole.flavorText: Using a hyperspace hole, the user appears right next to the target and strikes. This attack can hit a target using a move such as Protect or Detect.

water-shuriken.name: Water Shuriken
water-shuriken.flavorText: The user hits the target with throwing stars two to five times in a row. This move always goes first.

mystical-fire.name: Mystical Fire
mystical-fire.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.
mystical-fire.flavorText: The user attacks by breathing a special, hot fire. This also lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

spiky-shield.name: Spiky Shield
spiky-shield.description: Blocks damaging attacks and damages attacking Pokémon for 1/8 their max HP.
spiky-shield.flavorText: In addition to protecting the user from attacks, this move also damages any attacker that makes direct contact.

aromatic-mist.name: Aromatic Mist
aromatic-mist.description: Raises a selected ally’s Special Defense by one stage.
aromatic-mist.flavorText: The user boosts the Sp. Def stat of an ally Pokémon by using a mysterious aroma.

eerie-impulse.name: Eerie Impulse
eerie-impulse.description: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by two stages.
eerie-impulse.flavorText: The user's body generates an eerie impulse. Exposing the target to it harshly lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.

venom-drench.name: Venom Drench
venom-drench.description: Lowers the target’s Attack, Special Attack, and Speed by one stage if it is poisoned.
venom-drench.flavorText: Opposing Pokémon are drenched in an odd poisonous liquid. This lowers the Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats of a poisoned target.

powder.name: Powder
powder.description: Explodes if the target uses a Fire move this turn, damaging it for 1/4 its max HP and preventing the move.
powder.flavorText: The user covers the target in a combustible powder. If the target uses a Fire-type move, the powder explodes and damages the target.

geomancy.name: Geomancy
geomancy.description: Takes one turn to charge, then raises the user’s Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed by two stages.
geomancy.flavorText: The user absorbs energy and sharply raises its Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed stats on the next turn.

magnetic-flux.name: Magnetic Flux
magnetic-flux.description: Raises the Defense and Special Defense of all friendly Pokémon with Plus or Minus by one stage.
magnetic-flux.flavorText: The user manipulates magnetic fields, which boosts the Defense and Sp. Def stats of ally Pokémon with the Plus Ability or the Minus Ability.

happy-hour.name: Happy Hour
happy-hour.description: Doubles prize money. Stacks with a held item. Only works once per battle.
happy-hour.flavorText: Using Happy Hour doubles the amount of prize money received after battle.

electric-terrain.name: Electric Terrain
electric-terrain.description: For five turns, prevents all Pokémon on the ground from sleeping and strengthens their Electric moves to 1.5× their power. Changes Nature Power to Thunderbolt.
electric-terrain.flavorText: The user turns the ground into Electric Terrain for five turns, powering up Electric-type moves. Pokémon on the ground can no longer fall asleep.

dazzling-gleam.name: Dazzling Gleam
dazzling-gleam.flavorText: The user damages opposing Pokémon by emitting a powerful flash.

celebrate.name: Celebrate
celebrate.flavorText: The Pokémon congratulates you on your special day!

hold-hands.name: Hold Hands
hold-hands.flavorText: The user and an ally hold hands. This makes them very happy.

baby-doll-eyes.name: Baby Doll Eyes
baby-doll-eyes.description: Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage.
baby-doll-eyes.flavorText: The user stares at the target with its baby-doll eyes, which lowers the target's Attack stat. This move always goes first.

nuzzle.name: Nuzzle
nuzzle.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to paralyze the target.
nuzzle.flavorText: The user attacks by nuzzling its electrified cheeks against the target. This also leaves the target with paralysis.

hold-back.name: Hold Back
hold-back.description: Inflicts regular damage. Will not reduce the target’s HP below 1.
hold-back.flavorText: The user holds back when it attacks, and the target is left with at least 1 HP.

infestation.name: Infestation
infestation.description: Inflicts regular damage. For the next 2–5 turns, the target cannot leave the field and is damaged for 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn. The user continues to use other moves during this time. If the user leaves the field, this effect ends. Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times. Averages to 3 hits per use. Rapid Spin cancels this effect.
infestation.flavorText: The target is infested and attacked for four to five turns. The target can't flee during this time.

power-up-punch.name: Power Up Punch
power-up-punch.description: Inflicts regular damage. Raises the user’s Attack by one stage.
power-up-punch.flavorText: Striking opponents over and over makes the user’s fists harder. Hitting a target raises the Attack stat.

oblivion-wing.name: Oblivion Wing
oblivion-wing.description: Deals regular damage. Drains 75% of the damage inflicted to heal the user.
oblivion-wing.flavorText: The user absorbs its target’s HP. The user’s HP is restored by over half of the damage taken by the target.

thousand-arrows.name: Thousand Arrows
thousand-arrows.description: Inflicts regular damage. Grounds the target until it leaves battle. Ignores levitation effects and the immunity of Flying-type Pokémon.
thousand-arrows.flavorText: This move also hits opposing Pokémon that are in the air. Those Pokémon are knocked down to the ground.

thousand-waves.name: Thousand Waves
thousand-waves.description: Inflicts regular damage. Traps the target.
thousand-waves.flavorText: The user attacks with a wave that crawls along the ground. Those it hits can’t flee from battle.

lands-wrath.name: Lands Wrath
lands-wrath.flavorText: The user gathers the energy of the land and focuses that power on opposing Pokémon to damage them.

light-of-ruin.name: Light Of Ruin
light-of-ruin.description: Inflicts regular damage. User takes 1/2 the damage it inflicts in recoil.
light-of-ruin.flavorText: Drawing power from the Eternal Flower, the user fires a powerful beam of light. This also damages the user quite a lot.

origin-pulse.name: Origin Pulse
origin-pulse.flavorText: The user attacks opposing Pokémon with countless beams of light that glow a deep and brilliant blue.

precipice-blades.name: Precipice Blades
precipice-blades.flavorText: The user attacks opposing Pokémon by manifesting the power of the land in fearsome blades of stone.

dragon-ascent.name: Dragon Ascent
dragon-ascent.description: Inflicts regular damage, then lowers the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage each.
dragon-ascent.flavorText: The user attacks the target by dropping out of the sky at high speed. This also lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def stats.

hyperspace-fury.name: Hyperspace Fury
hyperspace-fury.description: Inflicts regular damage. Bypasses and removes any protection effect on the target.
hyperspace-fury.flavorText: Using its many arms, the user unleashes a barrage of attacks that ignore the effects of moves like Protect and Detect. This also lowers the user's Defense stat.

breakneck-blitz--physical.name: Breakneck Blitz  Physical
breakneck-blitz--physical.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

breakneck-blitz--special.name: Breakneck Blitz  Special
breakneck-blitz--special.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

all-out-pummeling--physical.name: All Out Pummeling  Physical
all-out-pummeling--physical.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

all-out-pummeling--special.name: All Out Pummeling  Special
all-out-pummeling--special.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

supersonic-skystrike--physical.name: Supersonic Skystrike  Physical
supersonic-skystrike--physical.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

supersonic-skystrike--special.name: Supersonic Skystrike  Special
supersonic-skystrike--special.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

acid-downpour--physical.name: Acid Downpour  Physical
acid-downpour--physical.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

acid-downpour--special.name: Acid Downpour  Special

catastropika.name: Catastropika
catastropika.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

shore-up.name: Shore Up
shore-up.description: Heals the user for ½ its max HP. During a Sandstorm, the healing is increased to ⅔.
shore-up.flavorText: The user restores its own HP by up to half its max HP. It regains more HP in a sandstorm.

first-impression.name: First Impression
first-impression.description: Inflicts regular damage. Can only be used on the user’s first turn after entering the field.
first-impression.flavorText: Although this move has great power, it works only on the first turn each time the user enters battle.

baneful-bunker.name: Baneful Bunker
baneful-bunker.description: Grants the user protection for the rest of the turn. If a Pokémon attempts to use a move that makes contact with the user, that Pokémon will be poisoned. This move’s chance of success halves every time it’s used consecutively with any other protection move.
baneful-bunker.flavorText: In addition to protecting the user from attacks, this move also poisons any attacker that makes direct contact.

spirit-shackle.name: Spirit Shackle
spirit-shackle.description: Inflicts regular damage. Traps the target.
spirit-shackle.flavorText: The user attacks while simultaneously stitching the target's shadow to the ground to prevent the target from fleeing.

darkest-lariat.name: Darkest Lariat
darkest-lariat.description: Inflicts regular damage. Damage calculation ignores the target’s stat modifiers, including evasion.
darkest-lariat.flavorText: The user swings both arms and hits the target. The target's stat changes don't affect the damage inflicted by this move.

sparkling-aria.name: Sparkling Aria
sparkling-aria.description: Inflicts regular damage. If the target has a burn and takes damage from this move, its burn is healed.
sparkling-aria.flavorText: The user bursts into song, emitting many bubbles. Any Pokémon suffering from a burn will be cured by the touch of these bubbles.

ice-hammer.name: Ice Hammer
ice-hammer.description: Inflicts regular damage, then lowers the user’s Speed by one stage.
ice-hammer.flavorText: The user swings its strong, heavy fist at the target to inflict damage. This also lowers the user's Speed stat.

floral-healing.name: Floral Healing
floral-healing.description: Heals the target for ½ its max HP. If Grassy Terrain is in effect, heals for ⅔ instead.
floral-healing.flavorText: The user restores the target's HP by up to half its max HP. More HP is restored when the ground is Grassy Terrain.

high-horsepower.name: High Horsepower
high-horsepower.flavorText: The user fiercely attacks the target using its entire body.

strength-sap.name: Strength Sap
strength-sap.description: Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage. Heals the user by the target’s current Attack, including modifiers, but not including this move’s Attack-lowering effect. If the target’s Attack is already at -6, this move will fail. In any other situation that would prevent a stat modification, the healing will still succeed.
strength-sap.flavorText: The user restores its own HP by the same amount as the target's Attack stat. It then lowers the target's Attack stat.

solar-blade.name: Solar Blade
solar-blade.description: Inflicts regular damage. User charges for one turn before attacking. During Sunny Day, the charge turn is skipped. During Hail, Rain Dance, or Sandstorm, power is halved. This move cannot be selected by Sleep Talk.
solar-blade.flavorText: The user gathers light on the first turn, then fills a blade with the light's energy and attacks on the next turn.

leafage.name: Leafage
leafage.flavorText: The user attacks by pelting the target with leaves.

spotlight.name: Spotlight
spotlight.description: For the duration of the turn, if the target is also a valid target for a move used by one of its opponents, that move will target it instead.
spotlight.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

toxic-thread.name: Toxic Thread
toxic-thread.description: Poisons the target and lowers its Speed by one stage.
toxic-thread.flavorText: The user shoots poisonous threads to poison the target and lower the target's Speed stat.

laser-focus.name: Laser Focus
laser-focus.description: The user’s next move will result in a critical hit.
laser-focus.flavorText: The user concentrates intensely. The attack on the next turn always results in a critical hit.

gear-up.name: Gear Up
gear-up.description: Raises the Attack and Special Attack of all friendly Pokémon with Plus or Minus by one stage.
gear-up.flavorText: The user engages its gears to raise the Attack and Sp. Atk stats of ally Pokémon with the Plus or Minus Ability.

throat-chop.name: Throat Chop
throat-chop.description: Inflicts regular damage. Silences the target for two turns, preventing it from using any sound-based moves.
throat-chop.flavorText: The user attacks the target's throat, and the resultant suffering prevents the target from using sound-based moves for two turns.

pollen-puff.name: Pollen Puff
pollen-puff.description: If the target is an opponent, inflicts regular damage. If the target is an ally, heals the target for 50% of its max HP.
pollen-puff.flavorText: The user attacks the enemy with a pollen puff that explodes. If the target is an ally, it gives the ally a pollen puff that restores its HP instead.

anchor-shot.name: Anchor Shot
anchor-shot.description: Inflicts regular damage. Traps the target.
anchor-shot.flavorText: The user entangles the target with its anchor chain while attacking. The target becomes unable to flee.

psychic-terrain.name: Psychic Terrain
psychic-terrain.description: Changes the terrain to Psychic Terrain for 5 turns. Overrides Electric Terrain, Grassy Terrain, and Misty Terrain. All Pokémon on the ground are immune to moves with priority greater than 0. (Moves that target the field rather than individual Pokémon, such as Spikes, are not affected.) Additionally, when a Pokémon on the ground uses a Psychic-type move, that move’s power is increased to 1.5×. If a Pokémon is holding a Terrain Extender when creating Psychic Terrain (by any means), the effect lasts for 8 turns instead of 5.
psychic-terrain.flavorText: This protects Pokémon on the ground from priority moves and powers up Psychic-type moves for five turns.

lunge.name: Lunge
lunge.description: Inflicts regular damage. Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage.
lunge.flavorText: The user makes a lunge at the target, attacking with full force. This also lowers the target's Attack stat.

fire-lash.name: Fire Lash
fire-lash.description: Inflicts regular damage. Lowers the target’s Defense by one stage.
fire-lash.flavorText: The user strikes the target with a burning lash. This also lowers the target's Defense stat.

power-trip.name: Power Trip
power-trip.description: Inflicts regular damage. Power is increased by 100% its original value for every stage any of the user’s stats have been raised. Accuracy, evasion, and lowered stats do not affect this move’s power. For a Pokémon with all five stats modified to +6, this move’s power is 31×.
power-trip.flavorText: The user boasts its strength and attacks the target. The more the user's stats are boosted, the greater the move's power.

burn-up.name: Burn Up
burn-up.description: Inflicts regular damage. Removes the user’s Fire type after damage calculation. If the user is not Fire-type, this move will fail.
burn-up.flavorText: To inflict massive damage, the user burns itself out. After using this move, the user will no longer be Fire type.

speed-swap.name: Speed Swap
speed-swap.description: Exchanges the original Speed stats of the user and target.
speed-swap.flavorText: The user exchanges Speed stats with the target.

smart-strike.name: Smart Strike
smart-strike.description: Inflicts regular damage. Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.
smart-strike.flavorText: The user stabs the target with a sharp horn. This attack never misses.

purify.name: Purify
purify.description: Cures the target of its major status ailment and heals the user for 50% of its max HP. If the target has no major status ailment, this move will fail.
purify.flavorText: The user heals the target’s status condition. If the move succeeds, it also restores the user’s own HP.

revelation-dance.name: Revelation Dance
revelation-dance.description: Inflicts regular damage. This move’s type matches the user’s first type, if any; otherwise, it’s typeless.
revelation-dance.flavorText: The user attacks the target by dancing with all its might. This move becomes the same type as the user's type.

core-enforcer.name: Core Enforcer
core-enforcer.description: Inflicts regular damage. If the target has already moved this turn, its ability is nullified.
core-enforcer.flavorText: If the Pokémon the user has inflicted damage on have already used their moves, this move eliminates the effect of the target’s Ability.

trop-kick.name: Trop Kick
trop-kick.description: Inflicts regular damage. Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage.
trop-kick.flavorText: The user lands an intense kick of tropical origins on the target. This also lowers the target's Attack stat.

instruct.name: Instruct
instruct.description: The target immediately uses its most recently-used move. This is independent of the target’s normal action for the turn (i.e., it may end up moving twice), but otherwise functions as usual, including deduction of PP. This effect works for disabled moves and ignores Torment.
instruct.flavorText: The user instructs the target to reuse the move last used by the target.

beak-blast.name: Beak Blast
beak-blast.description: Begins charging at the start of the turn, then attacks as normal. Any Pokémon that makes contact with the user while charging is burned. The charging is not affected by accuracy, sleep, paralysis, or any other effect that would interfere with a move.
beak-blast.flavorText: The user first heats up its beak, and then it attacks the target. Making direct contact with the user while it's heating up its beak results in a burn.

clanging-scales.name: Clanging Scales
clanging-scales.description: Inflicts regular damage. Lowers the user’s Defense by one stage.
clanging-scales.flavorText: The user rubs the scales on its entire body and makes a huge noise to attack opposing Pokémon. The user's Defense stat is lowered after the attack.

dragon-hammer.name: Dragon Hammer
dragon-hammer.flavorText: The user wields its body like a hammer to attack the target and inflict damage.

brutal-swing.name: Brutal Swing
brutal-swing.flavorText: The user swings its body around violently to inflict damage on everything in its vicinity.

aurora-veil.name: Aurora Veil
aurora-veil.description: Places the Aurora Veil effect on the user’s side of the field for the next 5 turns. If the weather is not Hail, or the weather is disabled by the effects of Cloud Nine or Air Lock, this move will fail. Any regular damage dealt to an affected Pokémon is reduced by ½. (If there are multiple Pokémon on the affected field, the reduction is ⅓.)
aurora-veil.flavorText: This move reduces damage from physical and special moves for five turns. This can be used only when it is snowing.

sinister-arrow-raid.name: Sinister Arrow Raid
sinister-arrow-raid.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

malicious-moonsault.name: Malicious Moonsault
malicious-moonsault.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

oceanic-operetta.name: Oceanic Operetta
oceanic-operetta.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

guardian-of-alola.name: Guardian Of Alola
guardian-of-alola.description: Inflicts direct damage equal to ¾ of the target’s remaining HP.
guardian-of-alola.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

soul-stealing-7-star-strike.name: Soul Stealing 7 Star Strike
soul-stealing-7-star-strike.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

stoked-sparksurfer.name: Stoked Sparksurfer
stoked-sparksurfer.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to paralyze the target.
stoked-sparksurfer.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

pulverizing-pancake.name: Pulverizing Pancake
pulverizing-pancake.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

extreme-evoboost.name: Extreme Evoboost
extreme-evoboost.description: Raises the user’s Attack, Defense, Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed by two stages each.
extreme-evoboost.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

genesis-supernova.name: Genesis Supernova
genesis-supernova.description: Inflicts regular damage, then (if successful) changes the terrain to Psychic Terrain.
genesis-supernova.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

shell-trap.name: Shell Trap
shell-trap.description: Inflicts regular damage. If the user was not yet hit by an opponent’s physical move this turn, this move will fail.
shell-trap.flavorText: The user sets a shell trap. If the user is hit by a physical move, the trap will explode and inflict damage on opposing Pokémon.

fleur-cannon.name: Fleur Cannon
fleur-cannon.description: Inflicts regular damage, then lowers the user’s Special Attack by two stages.
fleur-cannon.flavorText: The user unleashes a strong beam. The recoil from this move harshly lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat.

psychic-fangs.name: Psychic Fangs
psychic-fangs.description: Destroys any Light Screen or Reflect on the target’s side of the field, then inflicts regular damage.
psychic-fangs.flavorText: The user attacks by biting the target with its psychic capabilities. This move can also break barriers, such as Light Screen and Reflect.

stomping-tantrum.name: Stomping Tantrum
stomping-tantrum.description: Inflicts regular damage. Power is doubled if the user’s last move failed for any reason (i.e., produced the message "But it failed!") or was ineffective due to types.
stomping-tantrum.flavorText: Driven by frustration, the user attacks the target. This move's power is doubled if the user's previous move failed.

shadow-bone.name: Shadow Bone
shadow-bone.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
shadow-bone.flavorText: The user attacks by beating the target with a bone that contains a spirit. This may also lower the target’s Defense stat.

accelerock.name: Accelerock
accelerock.flavorText: The user smashes into the target at high speed. This move always goes first.

liquidation.name: Liquidation
liquidation.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
liquidation.flavorText: The user slams into the target using a full-force blast of water. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

prismatic-laser.name: Prismatic Laser
prismatic-laser.description: Inflicts regular damage. User loses its next turn to "recharge", and cannot attack or switch out during that turn.
prismatic-laser.flavorText: The user shoots powerful lasers using the power of a prism. The user can't move on the next turn.

spectral-thief.name: Spectral Thief
spectral-thief.description: Steals the target’s stat increases, then inflicts regular damage. Will not steal stat increases that would put any of the user’s stats at more than +6; any excess is left on the target. Stolen increases are affected by abilities as normal.
spectral-thief.flavorText: The user hides in the target’s shadow, steals the target’s stat boosts, and then attacks.

sunsteel-strike.name: Sunsteel Strike
sunsteel-strike.description: Inflicts regular damage. Other Pokémon’s abilities cannot activate in response to this move. In particular, it hits through Disguise
sunsteel-strike.flavorText: The user slams into the target with the force of a meteor. This move can be used on the target regardless of its Ability.

moongeist-beam.name: Moongeist Beam
moongeist-beam.description: Inflicts regular damage. Other Pokémon’s abilities cannot activate in response to this move. In particular, it hits through Disguise
moongeist-beam.flavorText: The user emits a sinister ray to attack the target. This move can be used on the target regardless of its Ability.

tearful-look.name: Tearful Look
tearful-look.description: Lowers the target’s Attack and Special Attack by one stage each.
tearful-look.flavorText: The user gets teary-eyed to make the target lose its combative spirit. This lowers the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats.

zing-zap.name: Zing Zap
zing-zap.description: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to make the target flinch.
zing-zap.flavorText: The user crashes into the target, delivering a powerful electric shock. This may also make the target flinch.

natures-madness.name: Natures Madness
natures-madness.description: Inflicts typeless damage equal to half the target’s remaining HP.
natures-madness.flavorText: The user hits the target with the force of nature. It halves the target’s HP.

multi-attack.name: Multi Attack
multi-attack.description: Inflicts regular damage. If the user is holding a plate or a drive, this move’s type is the type corresponding to that item. Note: This effect is technically shared by both Techno Blast and Judgment; however, Techno Blast is only affected by drives, and Judgment is only affected by plates.
multi-attack.flavorText: Cloaking itself in high energy, the user slams into the target. The memory held determines the move’s type.

10-000-000-volt-thunderbolt.name: 10 000 000 Volt Thunderbolt
10-000-000-volt-thunderbolt.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

mind-blown.name: Mind Blown
mind-blown.description: Inflicts damage, and the user takes damage equal to half of its max HP, rounded up. The user still takes damage if the move is blocked by Protect or Substitute, misses, or if the target has Flash Fire.
mind-blown.flavorText: The user attacks everything around it by causing its own head to explode. This also damages the user.

plasma-fists.name: Plasma Fists
plasma-fists.description: After inflicting damage, all Normal-type moves become Electric-type for the remainder of the turn, including status moves. This effect is applied after move type-changing abilities, such as Pixilate and Normalize.
plasma-fists.flavorText: The user attacks with electrically charged fists. This move changes Normal-type moves to Electric-type moves.

photon-geyser.name: Photon Geyser
photon-geyser.flavorText: The user attacks the target with a pillar of light. This move inflicts damage using the Attack or Sp. Atk stat—whichever is higher for the user.

light-that-burns-the-sky.name: Light That Burns The Sky
light-that-burns-the-sky.description: Inflicts damage using either Attack or Special Attack stat, whichever is higher. Determining which stat is used takes into account stat changes but not held items or abilities.
light-that-burns-the-sky.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

searing-sunraze-smash.name: Searing Sunraze Smash
searing-sunraze-smash.description: Inflicts regular damage. Other Pokémon’s abilities cannot activate in response to this move. In particular, it hits through Disguise
searing-sunraze-smash.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

menacing-moonraze-maelstrom.name: Menacing Moonraze Maelstrom
menacing-moonraze-maelstrom.description: Inflicts regular damage. Other Pokémon’s abilities cannot activate in response to this move. In particular, it hits through Disguise
menacing-moonraze-maelstrom.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

lets-snuggle-forever.name: Lets Snuggle Forever
lets-snuggle-forever.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

splintered-stormshards.name: Splintered Stormshards
splintered-stormshards.description: Inflicts damage and removes any terrain present on the battlefield.
splintered-stormshards.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

clangorous-soulblaze.name: Clangorous Soulblaze
clangorous-soulblaze.description: Inflicts sound-based damage to all opposing Pokémon and increases the user’s Attack, Defense, Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed by one stage each. The user’s stats are not raised if the move fails to damage any opposing Pokémon.
clangorous-soulblaze.flavorText: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
